skills.name: Arrow of Rebuke
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Removes 1 random debuff from this Champion and places it on the target.

skills.name: Mass Impalement
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Divine Wrath
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Damage inflicted is proportional to either this Champion’s ATK or the target’s DEF or ATK stat, whichever is highest. Deals an extra 30% C.DMG if the target’s ATK is highest. Ignores 30% of the target’s DEF if the target’s DEF is highest.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ATK in Faction Crypts by 34%.

skills.name: Hammer of Kaerok
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 50% chance of placing a [Stun] debuff for 1 turn. Will ignore 25% of the target’s RES if this Champion is under a [Shield] buff.

skills.name: Shield Crush
skills.description: Heals all allies by the total value of all [Shield]s on all allies. Then removes all [Shield]s from all allies and attacks all enemies. The damage dealt by this attack is equal to the total value of the [Shield]s removed (damage cannot exceed 1000% of this Champion’s DEF).

skills.name: Behold the Banner
skills.description: Places a [Shield] buff equal to 30% of this Champion’s HP on all allies for 2 turns, and a 50% [Ally Protection] buff on all allies except this Champion for 2 turns.

skills.name: Knight of Knights (Passive)
skills.description: Allies under [Shield] buffs receive 10% less damage. If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, only one will activate. ★★★ Banner Lords Unity ★★★ 1 Faction Ally: Allies under [Shield] buffs are immune to [Stun], [Freeze], [Sleep], [Provoke], [Fear], [True Fear], and [Petrification] debuff. 2 Faction Ally: Allies under [Ally Protection] buffs have a 20% chance of counterattacking when hit. 3 Faction Ally: The values of all ally [Shield] buffs are increased by 100%, except [Shield] buffs granted by Artifact Sets.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally DEF in All Battles by 25%. Increases Ally HP in All Battles by 15% for Banner Lords.

skills.name: Unflagging Assault
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 45% chance of placing a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff for 2 turns. The damage of this skill increases by 10% every time this skill is used. Stacks up to 100%

skills.name: Battlefield Domination
skills.description: Attacks all enemies 2 times. Places a [Shield] buff on this champion for 2 turns. The value of the shield buff is equal to 5% of this Champion’s MAX HP for each critical hit.

skills.name: Shut Down
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Has an 80% chance of stealing 100% of the target’s Turn Meter before attacking. This effect cannot be resisted if the target has a higher MAX HP than this champion.

skills.name: Grandeur (Passive)
skills.description: Decreases the damage taken from AoE attacks by 50%. If a target’s MAX HP is more than double this Champion’s MAX HP, this Champion’s attacks will deal damage based on the target’s MAX HP, instead of this Champion’s ATK.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally C.Rate in all battles by 19%.

skills.name: Blacktusk’s Ax
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 40% chance of placing a [Stun] debuff for 1 turn. This debuff cannot be resisted when this Champion is attacking out of their active turn.

skills.name: Captain’s Orders
skills.description: Removes all debuffs from all allies. Then teams up with all allies to attack a single enemy. The allies joining the attack will use their default skills.

skills.name: Defender of Skyiron
skills.description: Removes all buffs from a target enemy and places a [Stun] debuff on them for 2 turns. Fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 50%. Fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by an additional 10% for each buff removed from the target.

skills.name: Uniter of Dwarves (Passive)
skills.description: Allies will counterattack whenever they lose 10% or more of their MAX HP from a single hit. If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, only one will activate. ★★★ Dwarves Unity ★★★ 1 Faction Ally: Whenever an ally places a [Fear], [True Fear], [Freeze], [Provoke], [Sleep], [Stun], or [Petrification] debuff, fills that Champion’s Turn Meter by 20%. Occurs once per skill. If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, only one will activate. 2 Faction Ally: Whenever an ally is attacked, has a 50% chance of placing a 50% [Decrease RES] debuff and a 30% [Decrease SPD] debuff on the attacker for 1 turn. If the ally is under [Block Damage], [Unkillable], [Ally Protection], or [Stone Skin] buffs, the chance increases to 100%. If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, only one will activate. 3 Faction Ally: At the start of each Round, places a [Stone Skin] buff on all allies for 1 turn. If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, only one will activate.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ACC in All Battles by 60 Increases Ally SPD in All Battles by 15% for Dwarves.

skills.name: Gnarled Scythe
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Steals all buffs from the target the first time this Champion hits them with this skill. This effect cannot be resisted. Each subsequent time this attack hits an enemy, no buffs will be stolen. Instead, the damage will be increased by 10% for each buff on the target.

skills.name: Pierce the Carapace
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Will ignore [Strengthen], [Stone Skin], [Increase DEF], and [Ally Protection] buffs, as well as 25% of the target’s DEF. If this attack kills an enemy, fully heals this Champion and places a [Stone Skin] buff on them for 1 turn.

skills.name: Chill Wind of Autumn
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Before attacking, removes any [Increase DEF] buffs on each target and replace them with a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff for 2 turns. Also removes any [Strengthen] buffs on each target and replaces them with a 25% [Weaken] debuff for 2 turns. Places a [Block Buffs] debuff for 1 turn on enemies not under [Increase DEF] or [Strengthen] buffs before attacking. The buff removal and debuff placement cannot be resisted.

skills.name: Force of Nature
skills.description: Increases this Champion’s HP by 2,000 and DEF by 100 for every 1,000 ATK they have. Fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 10% whenever they receive a buff.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ATK in all Battles by 30%

skills.name: Foresight Slash
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 40% chance of increasing the duration of 2 random buffs on all allies by 1 turn.

skills.name: Reaping Slash
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Places a 60% [Increase DEF] buff and a [Shield] buff on all allies for 2 turns. The [Shield] is equal to 30% of this Champion’s MAX HP. If the target is a Boss, these buffs are protected.

skills.name: Cleanser Booster
skills.description: Removes all debuffs from all allies, and places a [Block Debuffs] buff on all allies for 2 turns. If a Boss is present in the current Round, this buff is protected.

skills.name: Alatreon Divinity (Passive)
skills.description: Fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 5% every time a debuff is placed on them. Also heals this Champion by 5% of their MAX HP whenever a debuff placed on them expires or is removed.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally SPD in Dungeons by 30%

skills.name: Photon Ax
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Places an extra hit if the target is under a [Shield] buff. Each hit will ignore [Shield] buffs.

skills.name: Rolling Thunder
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Before attacking, places a 60% [Increase DEF] buff on all allies for 2 turns. Places an extra hit on targets with less than 50% HP after the first hit. If the target’s HP is equal to or higher than 50% after the first hit, destroys the target’s MAX HP by 30% of the damage inflicted instead.

skills.name: Searing Glare
skills.description: Places a [Provoke] debuff on a target enemy for 2 turns. This debuff cannot be resisted if the target has less than 50% HP. Also places a [Counterattack] buff on all allies for 2 turns, and a [Block Damage] buff on all allies for 1 turn.

skills.name: Cuirass of the Sun (Passive)
skills.description: Increases this Champion’s DEF by 5% each time they counterattack (stacks up to 100%). Resets each Round.

skills.name: Boltquake
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Places an extra hit on enemies under [HP Burn] debuffs.

skills.name: Solar Flare
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Places a [HP Burn] debuff for 2 turns. This debuff cannot be resisted by enemies under a [Stone Skin] buff. Then, instantly activates any [HP Burn] debuffs on enemies under a [Stone Skin] buff. Also places a [True Fear] debuff on all enemies for 1 turn.

skills.name: Revitalizing Ray
skills.description: Fully restores all allies’ destroyed MAX HP, and heals all allies by 30% of this Champion’s MAX HP. Also places a 25% [Strengthen] buff and a 50% [Increase RES] buff on all allies for 2 turns.

skills.name: Heart of Heavens (Passive)
skills.description: Increases this Champion’s HP by 6 for every 1 DEF they have when in their Alternate Form. Increases the chance of enemy skills not activating when under [Fear] or [True Fear] debuffs by 20%, while also under a [HP Burn] debuff.

skills.name: Metamorph
skills.description: Transforms this Champion into their Base/Alternate Form. Then grants an Extra Turn.

skills.name: Arctic Warfare
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 50% chance of placing a [Freeze] debuff for 1 turn. The chance increases to 75% against enemies from the Orc and Ogryn Tribe Factions.

skills.name: Spraydown
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff for 2 turns. Also has a 75% chance of placing a [Weaken] debuff against enemies from the Orc and Ogryn Tribe Factions for 2 turns.

skills.name: Born to Win
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Removes all buffs from the target. Removes all buffs from the target before attacking when targeting enemies from the Orc and Ogryn Tribe Factions.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ACC in all Battles by 60

skills.name: Vorpal Sword
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Places an extra hit if the target has any active skills on cooldown. Each hit has an 80% chance of decreasing the duration of a random buff on the target by 1 turn.

skills.name: Clockwork Cyclone
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of increasing the cooldowns of all enemy skills by 2 turns. Also has a 75% chance of decreasing the target’s Turn Meter by 15%. If at least on of a target’s skills has its cooldown increased to the max, decreases their Turn Meter by 30% instead.

skills.name: Queenslayer
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Will ignore 20% of the target’s DEF. If the initial target is killed, also attacks the enemy with the lowest HP. Will also ignore 20% of the target’s DEF.

skills.name: Tick Tock (Passive, Cooldown: 3 turns)
skills.description: [Passive Effect] Whenever this Champion attacks, inflicts 3% bonus damage to each target for each turn remaining on all of their skill’s cooldowns. The bonus damage is counted individually for each target. [Active Effect] Resets the cooldown of on of this Champion’s skills each time they kill an enemy. Occurs once per skill.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ATK in All Battles by 30%

skills.name: Thunderous Maul
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Heals this Champion by 20% of the damage dealt. Has a 40% chance of increasing the duration of 2 random debuffs on the target Champion by 1 turn.

skills.name: Crack The Sky
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of removing 2 random buffs from all enemies. Has a 75% chance of removing all buffs from all enemies, even if this attack lands as a weak hit, if Jetni the Giant is on the same team. Also places a 15% [Continuous Heal] buff on all allies for 2 turns.

skills.name: Resounding Rally
skills.description: Fully heals a target ally. Also places a [Block Damage] buff on all allies for 2 turns.

skills.name: Trammel (Passive)
skills.description: When attacked, has a 50% chance of placing a 30% [Decrease SPD] debuff on the attacker for 2 turns. The chance increases to 100% if Jetni the Giant is on the same team.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally RES in all battles by 60.

skills.name: Searing Blow
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 60% chance of placing a 50% [Decrease ATK] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Wall of Flame
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Places a 60% [Increase DEF] buff on all allies for 2 turns. Places a [Shield] buff on all allies for 2 turns equal to 20% of their MAX HP if this attack kills an enemy.

skills.name: Fiery Rebirth (Passive)
skills.description: Revives a random ally with 30% HP every time this champion kills an enemy. Resets the cooldown on this Champion’s Skills if this Champion kills an enemy and all allies are alive.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally DEF in all Battles by 33%

skills.name: Satrap’s Secrets
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 100% chance of stealing 1 random buff from the target. Also has a 50% chance of placing a [Leech] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Dragonkin Knowledge
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 75% chance of placing a 50% [Decrease RES] debuff, a [Pain Link] debuff, and a 30% [Decrease SPD] debuff for 2 turns. These debuffs are protected when placed on Bosses. Heals all allies by 5% of this Champion’s MAX HP for each debuff placed.

skills.name: Ward of the Heritage
skills.description: Places a [Block Debuffs] buff on all allies for 2 turns. Heals all allies by 15% of this Champion’s MAX HP. Heals each ally by an additional 3% for each debuff on them. Removes any debuffs from allies negatively affecting stats, and replaces them with their mirrored buff equivalent, such as [Decrease ATK] being replaced with [Increase ATK]. Debuffs such as [Block Buffs], [Heal Reduction] and [Weaken] will be replaced with [Block Debuffs], [Continuous Heal] and [Strengthen] buffs respectively.

skills.name: Resilient Caste (Passive)
skills.description: Increases this Champion’s MAX HP by 10% whenever this Champion heals themselves using a skill (stacks up to 50%).

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally HP in All Battles by 28%

skills.name: Thirsting Sword
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Heals all allies by 5% of their MAX HP. Heals all allies by an additional 5% of their MAX HP if this Champion attacks a target under a [Leech] debuff.

skills.name: Deathplunge
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Heals all allies by 15% of this Champion’s MAX HP. The value of the heal increases by 5% for each [Leech] debuff on the enemy team. If a Champion receives any surplus heal, places a [Shield] buff on that Champion for 2 turns. The value of the [Shield] is equal to the amount of surplus heal received, up to 30% of the Champion’s MAX HP.

skills.name: All-Consuming Roar
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Places a [Leech] debuff for 2 turns and a [Provoke] debuff for 1 turn on all enemies. Also places a [Counterattack] buff on this Champion for 2 turns.

skills.name: Battle Revelry (Passive)
skills.description: Each time this Champion hits an enemy under a [Leech] debuff, increases this Champion’s DEF and HP by 5% (stacks up to 50%). When attacked by enemies whose ATK is higher than or equal to their DEF, has a 100% chance to place a 50% [Decrease ATK] debuff for 2 turns. When attacked by enemies whose DEF is higher than their ATK, has a 100% chance to place a 60% [Decrease DEF debuff for 2 turns instead. When attacked by enemies under a [Leech] debuff, has a 50% chance to place a [Provoke] debuff for 1 turn.

skills.name: Blade Axel
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Places a [Block Buffs] debuff for 2 turns. This debuff cannot be resisted if the target’s HP is lower than this Champion’s.

skills.name: Frenzied Execution
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Will ignore [Stone Skin] buffs. The damage inflicted by this skill increases by 50% if the target’s HP is lower than this Champion’s. Resets the cooldown of this skill if the target is killed.

skills.name: Soul Separator
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Before attacking, places a 30% [Increase C.DMG] buff on all allies for 2 turns. Steals 50% of the target’s Tum Meter. Steals 100% Turn Meter instead if the target’s HP is lower than this Champion’s. Destroys the target’s HP by 25%. Destroys 50% HP if the target’s HP is lower than this Champion’s.

skills.name: Rage Nexus (Passive)
skills.description: Will ignore 15% of a target’s DEF if the target’s HP is lower than this Champion’s. Will also ignore 15% of the target’s DEF if the target is under a [Leech] debuff. Every third skill this Champion uses will attack all enemies instead. This Champion joins every third attacking skill used by allies. This Champion will use their default skill when joining in that skill.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally DEF in All Battles by 35%

skills.name: Metamorph
skills.description: Transforms this Champion into their Base/Alternate Form. Then grants an Extra Turn.

skills.name: Pride’s Bite
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Places a 60% [Increase DEF] buff on all allies for 1 turn.

skills.name: Radiant Claw
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Increases the duration of all ally buffs by 1 turn. Also heals all allies by 4% of their MAX HP for every buff on them that had its duration increased.

skills.name: Rock of Werinbur
skills.description: Places a 50% [Increase RES] buff, a 25% [Strengthen] buff, and a 15% [Continuous Heal] buff on all allies for 2 turns. Places an additional 15% [Continuous Heal] buff on all allies with less than 50% HP for 2 turns.

skills.name: Knights of the Wild (Passive)
skills.description: Increases this Champion’s RES by 10 for each buff on each ally. Each critical hit inflicted by allies fills the Turn Meters of all allies by 5%.

skills.name: Gildthorn Assault
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 50% chance of placing a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff on all enemies for 1 turn.

skills.name: Palisade Breaker
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Places a 50% [Decrease RES] debuff, a 25% [Weaken] debuff, and an [Enfeeble] debuff on all enemies for 2 turns. If enemies have 50% HP or less, the [Enfeeble] debuff cannot be removed. Also decreases the Turn Meter of all enemies by 15%.

skills.name: Roar of Kitherus
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Before attacking, removes all buffs from all enemies and places a [Block Buffs] debuff on all enemies without buffs for 2 turns. If the target is a Boss, the damage inflicted is equal to 10% of their MAX HP.

skills.name: Lionheart (Passive)
skills.description: Increases this Champion’s ACC by 10 for each buff on each enemy. Each critical hit inflicted by allies decreases the Turn Meters of all enemies by 5%. If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, only one will activate.

skills.name: Metamorph
skills.description: Transforms this Champion into their Base/Alternate form. Then grants an Extra Turn.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally DEF in All Battles by 35%

skills.name: Exacerbate
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Places an extra hit if the enemy has a [Provoke] debuff.

skills.name: Infuriate
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Places a [Provoke] debuff on them for 1 turn. Also has a 75% chance of placing a [Provoke] debuff on them for 2 turns instead. Then places a 30% [Reflect Damage] buff on all allies for 2 turns. Also places a [Counterattack] buff on this Champion for 2 turns.

skills.name: Bravado (Passive)
skills.description: If an enemy with a [Provoke] debuff attacks this Champion, has a 40% chance of replacing it with another [Provoke] debuff for 1 turn. Also has a 90% chance of placing a 50% [Decrease ATK] debuff on an enemy for 1 turn when an enemy under a [Provoke] debuff attacks an ally. Each hit taken will reduce damage taken by 5% (up to 30% in one round).

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally HP in All Battles by 33%.

skills.name: Blink Cut
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Places a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff for 2 turns. Also places a [Perfect Veil] buff on this Champion for 1 turn.

skills.name: Umbral Stingers
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Before attacking, places a 50% [Increase ATK] buff on all allies for 2 turns. Will ignore 25% of a target’s DEF if they are not under a [HP Burn] debuff. Will ignore 50% of a target’s DEF if they are under a [HP Burn] debuff. Then, increases the duration of all enemy debuffs by 1 turn.

skills.name: Blisterbug Horde
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Damage increases by 25% against targets under any debuffs. Instantly activates any [HP Burn] debuffs on each enemy. If an enemy is not under any [HP Burn] debuffs, place a [HP Burn] debuff on them for 2 turns.

skills.name: Fleshsearer (Passive)
skills.description: Each time this Champion places a [HP Burn] debuff, decreases the target”s DEF by 3% (stacks up to 30%). For each [HP Burn] debuff on the enemy team, increase this Champion’s C.DMG by 10% (stacks up to 100%). Whenever an enemy [HP Burn] debuff activates, increase this Champion’s ATK by 5% (stacks up to 50%). Resets each Round.

skills.name: Crushing Pincers
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Places a 50% [Increase ACC] buff on the ally with the highest ACC for 2 turns and fills their Turn Meter by 10%.

skills.name: Putrid Cocoon
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Places a [Stun] debuff on all enemies for 1 turn. Also places two 15% [Continuous Heal] buffs on all allies for 2 turns.

skills.name: Behold The Beast
skills.description: Places a [Provoke] debuff on all enemies for 1 turn. Also places a 25% [Strengthen] buff and a 60% [Increase DEF] buff on all allies for 2 turns.

skills.name: Entomophobia (Passive)
skills.description: When attacked, has a 100% chance of placing a 25% [Weaken] debuff, and a 40% chance of placing a [Stun] debuff on the attacker for 1 turn. Increases this Champion’s DEF by 1 point for every 2 points of ATK when in their Alternate Form.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ATK in All Battles by 35%

skills.name: Metamorph
skills.description: Transforms this Champion into their Base/Alternate Form. Then grants an Extra Turn.

skills.name: Breaking Story
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 50% chance of placing a [Stun], [Freeze], [Sleep], [Provoke], [Fear], [True Fear], or [Petrification] on the target for 1 turn. Then places a [Perfect Veil] buff on this Champion for 2 turns.

skills.name: Explosive Scoop
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 75% chance of stealing all buffs from the target. Also has a 75% chance of stealing 100% of the target’s current Turn Meter. Then has a 75% chance of placing a [Nullify] debuff and a [Seal] debuff on the target for 2 turns. [Passive Effect] Has a 25% chance of activating the Explosive Scoop skill on an enemy when they gain an Extra Turn or Instant Turn effect. If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, only one will activate.

skills.name: Live on the Scene!
skills.description: Places a 50% [Increase ACC] buff on all allies for 2 turns. Also decreases the Turn Meters of all enemies by 20%. Then grants an Extra Turn.

skills.name: Ace Reporter (Passive, Cooldown: 3 turns)
skills.description: [Passive Effect] Whenever an enemy has their skill activated, teams up with allies to attack, gains an Extra Turn or an Instant Turn, has their skills’ cooldowns decreased, gets their Shield’s value increased, gets their destroyed HP restored, has their HP swapped by allies or by themselves, [Evades] an enemy effect or skill, has their Turn Meter equalized, or has their HP balanced from a skill, decreases all enemies’ Turn Meter by 10%. Occurs once per skill. If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, only one will activate. [Active Effect] Whenever enemies remove, transfer, or decrease the duration of any debuff to 0, decreases the Turn Meters of all enemies by 25%. If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, only one will activate.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally SPD in Arena by 28%

skills.name: Mesmeric Fangs
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit decreases the target’s Turn Meter by 5%. Each hit decreases the target’s Turn Meter by an additional 5% if the target is under any debuffs placed by this Champion.

skills.name: Moon-Spider Maw
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Decreases the Turn Meters of all enemies by 50%. Decreases the Turn Meters of all enemies by 100% instead if this skill is used on an Extra Turn or Instant Turn. Places a [True Fear] debuff for 1 turn. Places a [True Fear] debuff for 2 turns instead against enemies whose Turn Meter is fully decreased by this skill and Bosses.

skills.name: Dark Trance
skills.description: Removes all buffs from all enemies. Places a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff and a [Block Active Skills] debuff on all enemies for 2 turns. Grants an Extra Turn if 8 or more debuffs were placed by this skill.

skills.name: Spiderscuttle (Passive)
skills.description: Increases this Champion’s SPD by 4 for each debuff placed by this Champion and by 2 for each debuff resisted when this Champion attempts to place debuffs (stacks up to 100). Only counts debuffs placed by this Champion’s skills.

skills.name: Astral Ravage
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 5% for each critical hit. Fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by additional 5% for each critical hit, if the target is under a [Block Active Skills] debuff or a [Decrease DEF] debuff. If this attack kills an enemy, grants an Extra Turn instead.

skills.name: Deaththread Spin
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 3 times. Will always use this skill instead of the default skill when counterattacking. This skill cannot be blocked by [Block Active Skills] debuffs. Will ignore [Shield] and [Block Damage] buffs. Additionally ignores [Unkillable] buffs if the target is under a [Block Active Skills] debuff or a [Decrease DEF] debuff. Fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 15% for each critical hit.

skills.name: Gossamer Execution
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 4 times. Each hit will ignore 15% of the target’s DEF. Each hit will ignore 30% DEF instead if the target is under a [Block Active Skills] debuff or a [Decrease DEF] debuff. Fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 20% for each critical hit. Then places a [Perfect Veil] buff on this Champion for 2 turns.

skills.name: Great Web Mistress (Passive)
skills.description: This Champion is immune to [Stun], [Sleep], [Fear], [True Fear], [Provoke], [Freeze], and [Petrification] debuffs while under a [Veil] or [Perfect Veil] buff. This Champion also cannot receive critical hits while under a [Veil] or [Perfect Veil] buff.

skills.name: Metamorph
skills.description: Transforms this Champion into their Base/Alternate Form. Then grants an Extra Turn.

skills.name: Wyldking Polearm
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Heals all allies with less than 50% HP back to 50% of their MAX HP.

skills.name: Sacrificial Ploy
skills.description: Attacks 1 ally. The damage dealt is equal to 50% of the target’s current HP. Then places a [Shield] buff on that ally for 2 turns. The value of the [Shield] is equal to the amount of HP that ally is missing. Also fills that ally’s Turn Meter by an amount equal to the HP% they are missing, fills this champion’s Turn Meter by the same amount.

skills.name: Cackle of Blades

If this Champion is under a [Veil] or [Perfect Veil] buff, the chance increases to 100%.

skills.name: Masterful Thief (Passive)

Revives this Champion with 100% HP every 2 turns if at least one ally is alive. Once per Round, instantly revives this Champion with 100% HP if all allies are dead.

Will increase this Champion’s SPD by 6 for every 1% of Turn Meter filled by enemies instead, if this Champion’s ATK is higher than the enemy’s.

skills.name: Exterminate the Weak
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Damage of this skill increases by 30% if this Champion”s MAX HP is higher than each target”s MAX HP.

skills.name: Limitless Science (Passive)
skills.description: This Champion’s C.DMG is increased by 1% for every 1,000 HP they have. Increases this Champion’s MAX HP by 20% (stacks up to 100%) and SPD by 20 (stacks up to 100) whenever this Champion kills an enemy. Resets each Round.

skills.name: Arcs of Pain
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit increases this Champion’s DEF by 5% (stacks up to 100%).

skills.name: Pulverizing Procedure
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Heals this Champion by 50% of their MAX HP. Balances the HP of all allies. The HP levels of all allies will be brought up to the level of the ally with the highest HP.

skills.name: Engine of War
skills.description: Places a 50% [Ally Protection] buff on all allies except this Champion for 2 turns. Also places an [Unkillable] buff on this Champion for 2 turns. Then, places a [Shield] buff for 2 turns on all allies with less than 50% HP. The value of the [Shield] is proportional to this Champion”s DEF.

skills.name: Ensorcelled Plate (Passive)
skills.description: When attacked, reflects 80% of the damage this Champion receives back to the attacker. Debuffs placed on this Champion decrease their producer”s ACC by 10% (stacks up to 50%).

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally HP in All Battles by 35%

skills.name: Metamorph
skills.description: Transforms this Champion into their Base/Alternate Form. Then grants an Extra Turn.

skills.name: Howl
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 25% chance of placing an extra hit.

skills.name: Frightful Claws
skills.description: Attacks all enemies 2 times. Each hit has a 20% chance of placing a [Stun] debuff for 1 turn.

skills.name: Shred
skills.description: Attacks 4 times at random. Each hit has a 50% chance of placing a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally SPD in all Battles by 24%.

skills.name: Sword Through Time
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 50% chance of increasing the cooldown of a random skill on the target by 2 turns. When counterattacking with this skill, team up with a random ally. The ally joining the attack will use their default skill.

skills.name: You Will Not Falter!
skills.description: Places a [Block Debuffs] buff, a [Block Damage] buff, and a [Counterattack] buff on a target ally for 2 turns. If the target of this skill is not this Champion, resets the cooldown of all of the target’s skills. This skill’s cooldown cannot be decreased.

skills.name: Exalted Lineage
skills.description: Places a 50% [Increase ATK] buff, a 30% [Increase C.RATE] buff, and a 30% [Increase C.DMG] buff on all allies for 2 turns.

skills.name: Lead From The Front (Passive)
skills.description: Whenever a buff is placed on an ally, fills their Turn Meter by 3%. ★★★ High Elves Unity ★★★ 1 Faction Ally: Allies deal 25% more damage when attacking out of their active turn. 2 Faction Ally: Whenever a buff is removed or stolen from an ally, or when it expires, fills their Turn Meter by 10%. 3 Faction Ally: Allies will ignore 5% of a target’s DEF for each buff on them.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally SPD in All Battles by 20% Increases Ally C.RATE in All Battles by 15% for High Elves.

skills.name: Beheading Strike
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Before attacking, decreases the duration of all buffs on the target by 1 turn. Also has a 75% chance of placing a [Block Buffs] debuff for 2 turns. This debuff is protected when placed on Bosses.

skills.name: Gaellen Fury
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a [Stun] debuff for 1 turn and a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff for 2 turns. Decreases the Turn Meters of enemies without a [Stun] debuff by 30%.

skills.name: Blood of the Pact
skills.description: Removes all debuffs from all allies, then heals them by 25% of this Champion’s MAX HP. Places a [Shield] buff, equal to 25% of this Champion’s MAX HP, and a 25% [Fortify] buff on all allies for 2 turns.

skills.name: Freedom or Death (Passive)
skills.description: For every 10 debuffs this Champion’s team receives, activates the Blood Of The Pact skill. When activated in this way, the buffs placed by the Blood Of The Pact skill are protected. Does not set the Blood Of The Pact skill on cooldown. If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, only one will activate. This skill will not activate on duplicate copies of this Champion, if this particular Champion is dead.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally HP in All Battles by 35%

skills.name: Chuckling Sickles
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Grants an Extra Turn if this attack kills an enemy.

skills.name: Jester’s Remedy
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has 75% chance of placing [Sleep] debuff on each enemy for 1 turn. Also has a 75% chance of placing 2 [Bomb] debuffs on each enemy that detonates after 2 turns.

skills.name: Explosive Wit
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. The first hit instantly detonated all [Bomb] debuffs on the target. The second hit will ignore all [Unkillable] buffs on the target.

skills.name: Mad Bomber (Passive)
skills.description: When attacked, has a 30% chance of placing [Bomb] debuff on the attacker that detonates after 2 turns. Occurs once per hit. Instantly detonates all [Bomb] debuffs on all enemies whenever this Champion is killed.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ATK in all Battles by 25%

skills.name: Wing Clip
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Places a 30% [Decrease SPD] debuff for 2 turns. When counterattacking, the damage inflicted by this skill is based on this Champion’s DEF and the enemy’s MAX HP.

skills.name: Cutting Jibe
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Places a [Provoke] debuff for 1 turn. If the target is a Boss, places a [Provoke] debuff for 2 turns instead. Also places an [Unkillable] buff on this Champion for 1 turn and a [Counterattack] buff on them for 2 turns.

skills.name: Bloodcrest’s Call
skills.description: Fully restores all allies destroyed MAX HP. Also places a [Revive On Death] buff and a 60% [Increase DEF] buff on all allies for 2 turns. Then, grants an Extra Turn.

skills.name: Rule the Roost (Passive)
skills.description: Reflects 50% of the damage this Champion receives back to the attacker. If the attacker is a Boss, reflects 100% of the damage this Champion receives and also heals this Champion by 50% of the damage received.

skills.name: Fulminous Screech
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. places an extra hit on all enemies under [Decrease DEF] debuffs.

skills.name: Sundered Sky
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Before attacking, places a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff for 2 turns. This effect cannot be resisted. Damage increases by 10% for each enemy under a [Decrease DEF] debuff. Also steals 20% of the Turn Meter from each enemy.

skills.name: Sonic Torture
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Will ignore 20% of each target’s DEF if they have no buffs. Ignores [Block Damage] buffs. Damage increases by 15% for each buff on each target. Decreases the duration of all enemy buffs by 2 turns.

skills.name: Unholy Experiment (Passive)
skills.description: Immune to [Stun], [Freeze], [Sleep], [Fear], [True Fear], [Provoke], [Sheep], and [Petrification] debuffs. Also randomly resets the cooldown of one of this Champion’s skills whenever they kill an enemy. Occurs once per skill.

skills.name: Metamorph
skills.description: Transforms this Champion into the Base/Alternate Form. Then grants an Extra Turn.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally DEF in All Battles by 33%

skills.name: Seal Scroll
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit has a 30% chance of placing a [Block Active Skills] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Thief of Blood
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has an 80% chance of stealing all buffs from each enemy. After stealing, applies a [Buff Spread] effect, taking all buffs from this Champion and placing them on all allies.

skills.name: Dread Invocation
skills.description: Can target dead or living enemies. If the target is dead, place a [Block Revive] on them, then attacks all enemies. Each enemy will receive damage equal to 20% of the target enemy’s MAX HP. If the target is a Boss’ minion, the damage is equal to 20% of this Champion’s MAX HP. This attack cannot be critical and will ignore any [Shield] buffs and 100% of each target’s DEF. If the target is alive, place a [True Fear] debuff on them for 2 turns and heals all allies by 20% of the target enemy’s MAX HP. If the target is a Boss or a Boss’ minion, the healing is equal to 20% of this champion’s MAX HP. The [True Fear] debuff cannot be resisted.

skills.name: Soul Charge (Passive, Cooldown: 2 turns)
skills.description: Revives 1 random ally with 30% HP and 30% Turn Meter each time an enemy is killed. Revives 1 random ally with 30% HP and 30% Turn Meter each time a [Block Revive] debuff is placed on an enemy.

skills.name: Links Of Death
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 50% chance of placing a 50% [Decrease ATK] debuff and a 25% [Weaken] debuff for 1 turn.

skills.name: Wretched Guillotine
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a [Provoke] debuff for 1 turn. Places a 60% [Increase DEF] buff and a [Shield] buff on all allies for 2 turns. The value of the [Shield] is proportional to this Champion’s DEF.

skills.name: You Stand Accused
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Will ignore [Life Barrier], [Poison Cloud], [Shield], and [Block Damage] buffs, as well as 25% of the target’s DEF. If the target was killed by this skill, revives a random dead ally with 50% HP and 50% Turn Meter. This revive will ignore [Block Revive] debuffs. Places a [Block Revive] debuff on targets killed by this skill.

skills.name: Fallen Legend (Passive)
skills.description: Whenever this Champion kills an enemy or decapitates a Hydra Head, fills the Turn Meters of all allies by 25% and heals them by 25% of their MAX HP. Heal Multiplier: 0.25 Target Max HP

skills.name: Master Wills It (Passive)
skills.description: Whenever an enemy is revived, instantly activates the You Stand Accused skill against that enemy. If multiple enemies are revived, the initial target of the revive will be targeted by the You Stand Accused skill. Will not put the You Stand Accused skill on cooldown. Has a 50% chance of activating the You Stand Accused skill on an enemy whenever an ally is killed. Occurs once per turn. Instantly activates the You Stand Accused skill against a Hydra Head whenever an ally is consumed by that Head. Will not put the You Stand Accused skill on cooldown. If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, only one will activate.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally DEF in All Battles by 33%

skills.name: Flowing Cuts
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 3 times. Each hit fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 6%.

skills.name: Steel Parting
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff for 2 turns. Each critical hit fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 10%.

skills.name: Fated Vengeance
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Will ignore Unkillable buffs and Shield Buffs. Fills this champion’s turn meter by 30%. Fills these champions turn meter by 60% instead if the target has 50% HP or less after this attack. Also decreases the cooldown of Steel Parting and Fated Vengeance skills by 1 turn if this attack kills an enemy.

skills.name: Bushido (Passive)
skills.description: Increases this Champion’s SPD by 10 and RES by 50 if there are fewer champions on this Champion’s team than the number of enemies on the enemy team. This effect always works when fighting bosses.

skills.name: Breaker Suite
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Has a 30% chance of repeating the attack.

skills.name: March of Tin
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Decreases the Turn Meters of all targets by 30%. This effect cannot be resisted. Places an [Unkillable] buff on this champion for 1 turn if this attack kills an enemy.

skills.name: Deadly Ballet
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Will ignore [Strengthen], [Stone Skin], [Unkillable], [Block Damage], [Increase DEF], [Ally Protection], and [Shield] buffs. Grants an extra turn if this attack kills an enemy.

skills.name: Crack any Shell (Passive)
skills.description: Has a 50% chance for this champion to ignore 50% of the target’s DEF from each hit placed by this Champion’s skill.

skills.name: Foecrusher
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Before attacking, removes all buffs from the target. Increases the cooldown of a random skill on the target by 2 turns, even if this attack lands as a weak hit.

skills.name: Hammerquake
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Places a [Provoke] debuff on all enemies for 1 turn. This debuff will ignore [Block Debuffs] buff and can be placed even if this attack lands as a weak hit. Also places a protected [Unkillable] buff and a [Counterattack] buff on this Champion for 3 turns.

skills.name: Bonded by Blood
skills.description: Removes all debuffs from all allies and places a 50% [Ally Protection] buff on all allies except this Champion for 2 turns. Also places a [Shield] buff on all allies equal to 30% of this Champion’s MAX HP for 2 turns. Increases the value of the [Shield] by an additional 3% of this Champion’s MAX HP per each debuff removed by this skill.

skills.name: Kill or Cure (Passive)
skills.description: When attacked, decreases the duration of all buffs on the attacker by 1 turn. Occurs once per hit. Also heals all allies except this Champion by 50% of the damage taken, and heals this Champion by 25% of the damage taken, whenever this Champion is hit. Occurs once per hit.

skills.name: Magma Slam
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 25% chance of repeating the attack. Will ignore [Block Damage] buffs.

skills.name: Calamitious Maul
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Damage of this skill increases by 10% for each buff on this Champion and on the target. Will ignore 30% of the target’s DEF. Will ignore 50% of the target’s DEF instead if this Champion has more buffs than the target.

skills.name: Crimson Haze (Passive)
skills.description: Whenever an ally attacks, this Champion has a 50% chance to team up with them and join their attack. This Champion inflicts more damage as their HP decreases (by 1% for every 1% of HP lost). This Champion receives less damage as their HP decreases (by 0.5% for every 1% of HP lost).

skills.name: Cornered Animal (Special, Cooldown: 2 turns)
skills.description: Removes all debuffs from this Champion. Places a 50% [Increase ATK] buff, a 30% [Increase C.DMG] buff, and a 30% [Increase C. RATE] buff on all allies for 3 turns. Grants an Extra Turn. [This skill unlocks when this Champion has 3 or more debuffs, or when this Champion has 50% or less HP.]

skills.name: Metamorph
skills.description: Transforms this Champion into their Base/Alternate Form. Then grants an Extra Turn.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally HP in All Battles by 35%

skills.name: Energy Bolt
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 50% chance of placing a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Petrify
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a 100% [Heal Reduction] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Ancestral Spirits
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff for 2 turns. This debuff cannot be resisted. Places a 50% [Increase ATK] buff on all allies for 2 turns.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ACC in Faction Crypts by 65.

skills.name: Revelation Spear
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Places an extra hit on enemies under [Decrease C.RATE] or [Decrease C.DMG] debuffs placed by this Champion. The extra hit is always a normal hit and will ignore 50% of each target’s DEF. Also places a 60% [Increase DEF] buff on this Champion for 2 turns.

skills.name: Truth Beheld
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Before attacking, increases the duration of all ally buffs by 1 turn. Damage inflicted by this skill increases by 5% for each buff that had its duration increased.

skills.name: Censer Barrier
skills.description: Places a 30% [Reflect Damage] buff on all allies for 2 turns, and a 50% [Ally Protection] buff on all allies except this Champion for 2 turns. Also places a 25% [Strengthen] buff and a 50% [Increase RES] buff on this Champion for 2 turns.

skills.name: Maw of Deterrence (Passive)
skills.description: Whenever an ally under a [Reflect Damage] buff is attacked, places a 30% [Decrease C.RATE] debuff and a 30% [Decrease C.DMG] debuff on the attacker for 2 turns. This effect cannot be resisted.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally DEF in All Battles by 25%

skills.name: Plunging Beak
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 50% chance of increasing the cooldown of one of the target’s Skills by 2 turns at random.

skills.name: Befuddle

skills.name: Gatewatch Stance
skills.description: Places a 60% [Increase DEF] buff on this Champion for 3 Turns and a [Counterattack] buff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Laughing Gull (Passive, Cooldown: 4 turns)
skills.description: [Passive Effect] Increase this Champion’s DEF each time they counterattack (10% of Total Defense per Attack). DEF resets every time this Champion gets a turn. When attacking, converts this Champion’s RES into additional ACC. [Active Effect] At the end of this Champion’s turn, places a [Provoke] debuff for 1 turn on all enemies under [Increase ATK] buffs.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally RESIST in all Battles by 80

skills.name: Magma Hurl

If the target is not under a [HP Burn] debuff, decreases the duration of 2 random buffs on that enemy by 1 turn instead. These effects cannot be resisted if this attack is critical. Then, attacks all enemies not under [HP Burn] debuffs, except the initial target. Decreases the duration of 2 random buffs on all enemies hit by 1 turn. This effect cannot be resisted if this attack is critical.

skills.name: Flames of Resentment
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Before attacking, increases the duration of all [HP Burn] debuffs on all enemies by 1 turn, then instantly activates any [HP Burn] debuffs on each enemy. This effect cannot be resisted if this Champion’s C.RATE is 100% or higher. Finally, increases the duration of all debuffs on all enemies by 1 turn, and places a 30% [Decrease SPD] debuff on all enemies for 2 turns. These effects cannot be resisted if this attack is critical.

skills.name: Let Me At ‘Em!
skills.description: Places a 30% [Increase С.DMG] buff, a 30% [Increase C.RATE] buff and a 30% [Increase SPD] buff on all allies for 3 turns. Then, grants an Extra Turn.

skills.name: Spark of Anger (Passive, Cooldown: 1 turn)

This effect cannot be resisted if this Champion’s C.RATE is 100% or higher. Also before the start of this Champion’s turn, has a 50% chance of placing a [HP Burn] debuff on all enemies for 1 turn. This effect cannot be resisted if this Champion’s C.RATE is 100% or higher.

skills.name: Totemic Vengeance

Increases the duration of 2 random debuffs on the target by 1 turn. If attacking all enemies, increases the duration of 2 random debuffs on all enemies by 1 turn instead. This effect cannot be resisted if this attack is critical.

skills.name: KABOOM!
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Before attacking, places a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff on all enemies for 2 turns. This debuff cannot be resisted if the target is under a [HP Burn] debuff. Places an extra hit on enemies under [HP Burn] debuffs. Grants an Extra Turn if this attack kills an enemy.

skills.name: Ungodly Fury

When calculating the damage inflicted by the [Pain Link] debuff, 75% of the attacker’s skill multiplier is reflected. The damage inflicted by the [Pain Link] debuff will ignore 100% of the target’s DEF. Also places a [Taunt] buff and an [Unkillable] buff on this Champion for 2 turns. Finally, places a 50% [Ally Protection] buff on all allies except this Champion for 2 turns.

skills.name: Burning Juggernaut (Passive)
skills.description: Will ignore 15% of a target’s DEF if this Champion’s HP or the target’s HP is equal to or greater than 50%. If this Champion’s HP or the target’s HP is less than 50%, will ignore 25% of the target’s DEF instead. Will also ignore [Block Damage] and [Shield] buffs when attacking enemies under [HP Burn] debuffs. Inflicts 20% more damage to enemies not under a [HP Burn] debuff.

skills.name: Metamorph
skills.description: Transform this Champion into their Base/Alternate Form. Then grants an Extra Turn.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally C.RATE in All Battles by 27%

skills.name: Boreal Bolt
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit has a 35% chance of placing a [Freeze] debuff for 1 turn. If the target has 50% HP or less, this debuff cannot be resisted.

These buffs will be placed even if no allies were revived. If no allies were revived by this skill, grants this Champion an Extra Turn.

skills.name: Thaw-might (Passive)
skills.description: Allies under a [Perfect Veil] buff placed by this Champion deal 10% more damage. Allies under a [Perfect Veil] buff placed by this Champion deal an additional 10% damage to enemies under [Veil] or [Perfect Veil] buffs.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally SPD in All Battles by 19%

skills.name: Glittering Smash
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 50% chance of placing a [Freeze] debuff for 1 turn. Also applies a [Debuff Spread] effect, taking all debuffs from the target and placing them on all enemies under [Freeze] debuffs.

skills.name: Breath of Rime
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Also steals all buffs from all enemies. Places a 25% [Weaken] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Everwinter
skills.description: Places a [Block Debuffs] buff on all allies for 2 turns. Also has a 75% chance of placing a [Freeze] debuff on all enemies for 1 turn. Fills the Turn Meters of all allies by 15%. Fills the Turn Meters of each ally by an extra 5% for each [Freeze] debuff placed by this skill.

skills.name: Timeless (Passive)
skills.description: This Champion’s skills cannot be put on cooldown. Whenever an enemy tries to put either this Champion’s skills or an ally’s skills on cooldown, places a [Freeze] debuff on that enemy. The [Freeze] debuff cannot be blocked or resisted. Also has a 50% chance of denying the cooldown increase effect. That chance increases by 25% for each enemy under a [Freeze] debuff. Will not deny cooldown increasing effects from Bosses. Whenever an enemy tries to put either this Champion’s skills or an ally’s skills on cooldown, activates an [Instant Turn] effect on this Champion. Occurs once per turn.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally Resist in all Battles by 60

skills.name: Spear of Serenity
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy with 1 random ally from the Argonites Faction. The ally joining the attack will use their default skill. Heals all allies by 10% of this Champion’s MAX HP.

skills.name: Gift of Thalass
skills.description: Removes all debuffs from all allies and places a [Block Debuffs] buff and a [Fervor] buff on all allies for 2 turns.

skills.name: Glorious Revival
skills.description: Revives all dead allies with 50% HP and 50% Turn Meter. Places a 25% [Strengthen] buff and a 30% [Increase SPD] buff on all allies for 2 turns.

skills.name: Shield of the Argolades (Passive)
skills.description: Whenever an ally receives a debuff, places a [Shield] buff on that ally equal to 20% of their MAX HP for 1 turn. Fills the Turn Meters of all allies by 15% at the end of this Champion’s turn.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally RES in All Battles by 50

skills.name: Pestilent Censer
skills.description: Attacks 3 times at random. Each hit has a 40% chance of placing a [Bomb] debuff for 2 turns. [Bomb] debuffs placed by this skill on enemies whose MAX HP is equal to or higher than 200,000 will deal double damage.

skills.name: Verminlord’s Command
skills.description: Attack all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a 50% [Decrease ATK] debuff for 2 turns. Also has a 75% chance of decreasing the detonation countdown of all [Bomb] debuffs by 1 turn, and increasing the duration of all [Poison] debuffs by 1 turn.

skills.name: Unclean Banquet
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing 2 [Bomb] debuffs on each target for 2 turns, then grants an Extra Turn. [Bomb] debuffs placed by this skill on enemies whose MAX HP is equal to or higher than 200,000 will deal double damage.

skills.name: Rat Plague (Passive)
skills.description: Every time a [Bomb] debuff placed by this champion detonates or is removed, places two 5% [Poison] debuffs for 2 turns. These debuffs are protected.

skills.description: Increases Ally ATK in all battles by 30%

skills.name: Dwarven Might
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 3 times. Each hit has an 80% chance of decreasing the target’s Turn Meter by 15%. If the target’s Turn Meter is not decreased, each hit has an 80% chance of placing a [Freeze] debuff on the target for 1 turn instead.

skills.name: Fury of the King
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a 50% [Decrease ATK] debuff and a 25% [Weaken] debuff on all enemies for 2 turns. Also places a [Counterattack] buff on this Champion for 2 turns.

skills.name: Blessed Bash
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 3 times. Each hit decreases the target’s DEF by 3% (Stacks up to 30%). Each hit also heals this Champion by 30% of the damage dealt.

skills.name: No Holding Back (Passive)
skills.description: When counterattacking, deals 100% of damage instead of 75%

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ACC in Dungeons by 80.

skills.name: Mete Punishment
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. The first hit has a 50% chance of placing a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff for 2 turns. The second hit has a 50% chance of placing a [Provoke] debuff for 1 turn.

skills.name: Concuss
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. has a 75% chance of placing a [Stun] debuff for 1 turn.

skills.name: Vow of the Dwarves
skills.description: Places a 60% [Increase DEF] buff on all allies for 2 turns, then removes any [Decrease DEF] and [Weaken] debuffs from all allies.

skills.name: Brass Clad (Passive, Cooldown: 4 turns)
skills.description: Passive Effect: Whenever an ally is attacked while under [Block Damage] buff placed by this champion, has a 75% chance of placing a [Stun] debuff on the attacker for 1 turn. skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit has a 35% chance of placing a [Stun] debuff for 1 turn. After attacking, transfers all debuffs from the ally with the most debuffs to the target. Will not transfer [Stun], [Freeze], [Sleep], [Fear], [True Fear], [Provoke], [Petrification], and [Sheep] debuffs.

skills.name: Shining Blitz
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Before attacking, removes all buffs from the target. The ally with the highest C.DMG will team up and join the attack. The ally joining the attack will use their default skill and ignore 35% of the target’s DEF. If the enemy is killed by the ally joining this attack, activates an [Instant Turn] effect on that ally.

skills.name: Revival Radiance (6 turns)
skills.description: Revives a dead ally with 75% HP and 75% Turn Meter. Places a 50% [Increase ATK] buff and a [Perfect Veil] buff on that ally for 2 turns.

skills.name: Lightmarked (Passive)
skills.description: At the start of this Champion’s turn, has a 40% chance to remove any [Block Debuffs] buffs from each enemy and replace them with [Block Buffs] debuffs. Also has a 40% chance to remove any buffs positively affecting stats, and replace them with their mirrored debuff equivalent, such as [Increase ATK] being replaced with [Decrease ATK]. Buffs such as [Continuous Heal] and [Strengthen] will be replaced with [Heal Reduction] and [Weaken] debuffs respectively.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally DEF in All Battles by 30%

skills.name: Blessed Spear
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 50% chance of placing a 50% [Decrease ATK] debuff for 2 turns. Also has an 80% chance of placing a 50% [Increase ATK] buff on the ally with the highest ATK for 1 turn.

skills.name: Anointed Phalanx
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of decreasing the duration of all enemy buffs by 2 turns. Then increases the duration of all ally buffs by 1 turn. Also heals all allies by 20% of this Champion’s MAX HP.

skills.name: Psalm of Revival
skills.description: Revives all dead allies with 50% HP and 50% Turn Meter. If an ally’s DEF is equal to or higher than their ATK, places a 60% [Increase DEF] buff on them for 2 turns. If an ally’s ATK is higher than their DEF, places a 50% [Increase ATK] buff on them for 2 turns instead.

skills.name: Shining Evensong (Passive)
skills.description: Removes 1 random debuff from all allies at the start of this Champion’s Turn. Places a 15% [Continuous Heal] buff on the ally with the lowest HP for 1 turn at the end of this Champion’s turn.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ACC in all battles by 60.

skills.name: Frostflame Torch
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit has a 50% chance of placing a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff for 2 turns. If Tormin the Cold is on the same team, has a 25% chance to instantly activate his Rimefire skill.

skills.name: Embittering Cold
skills.description: Removes all buffs from all enemies, and places a [Freeze] debuff on all enemies for 1 turn. If Tormin the Cold is on the same team, instantly activates his Blizzard Rage skill. This skill’s cooldown cannot be decreased or reset.

skills.name: Ward of the Glacier
skills.description: Revives all dead allies with 50% HP and 30% Turn Meter. Places a [Block Damage] buff on all allies for 1 turn and a 30% [Increase SPD] buff on all allies for 2 turns. Will place these buffs even if no allies were revived. If no allies were revived by this skill, also fills the Turn Meters of all allies by 25%. This skill’s cooldown cannot be decreased or reset.

skills.name: Divine Mission (Passive)
skills.description: Whenever an enemy receives a [Freeze] debuff, this Champion steals 1 random buff from them, places a [HP Burn] debuff on them for 2 turns and decreases their Turn Meter by 10%. If Tormin the Cold is on the same team, fills his Turn Meter by an amount equal to the enemy Turn Meter decreased by this skill. If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, only one will activate. This skill will not activate on duplicate copies of this Champion, if this particular Champion is dead.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally SPD in All Battles by 19%

skills.name: Rampant Blows
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. If this Champion is under a [Veil] or [Perfect Veil] buff, each hit has a 50% chance to decrease the target’s Turn Meter by 15%. Places a 50% [Increase ATK] buff on this Champion for 2 turns if this attack is critical.

skills.name: Overthrow
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 3 times. If the target is under a [Hex] debuff, each hit will ignore 25% of the target’s DEF. Will ignore a further 25% of the target’s DEF if they are also under a [Decrease SPD] debuff. Will also ignore an additional 25% of the target’s DEF if they are from the Banner Lords or Knights Revenant Factions.

skills.name: Witchfinder
skills.description: Attacks 4 times at random. Each hit has a 75% chance of placing a [Hex] debuff for 3 turns and a 30% [Decrease SPD] debuff for 2 turns. Champions from the Banner Lords and Knights Revenant Factions cannot resist these debuffs. Each hit also has a 75% chance to steal 25% of the target’s Turn Meter. If the target is from the Banner Lords or Knights Revenant Factions, steals 50% of the Turn Meter instead. Also places a [Perfect Veil] buff on this Champion for 2 turns.

skills.name: Hunter’s Guile (Passive)
skills.description: If this Champion attacks a target under a [Hex] debuff and a [Decrease SPD] debuff, places a [Perfect Veil] buff on this Champion for 1 turn. This effect will not activate when counterattacking. Also increases this Champion’s C. DMG by 30% while attacking under a [Perfect Veil] buff.

skills.name: Lethal Lust
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Grants an Extra Turn and decreases the cooldown of the Statis Strike skill by 2 turns if this attack kills an enemy.

skills.name: Arcane Tempest
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff an a 50% [Decrease ACC] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Stasis Strike
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Fully depletes the target’s Turn Meter. Will also attack all enemies if the first attack is critical. This AoE attack has a 75% chance of placing a 25% [Weaken] debuff for 2 turns. Will also place a [HP Burn] debuff for 2 turns after the attack on the enemies whose Turn Meters are below 30%.

skills.name: Staid (Passive)
skills.description: Fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 10% every time they are hit. Occurs once per hit. Also fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 20% whenever an ally dies.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ATK in Arena Battles by 35%.

skills.name: Skull Rattle
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 15% chance of placing a [Stun] debuff for 1 turn.

skills.name: Battle Shout
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 50% chance of placing a [Provoke] debuff for 1 turn.

skills.name: Turn to Ash
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a [HP Burn] debuff for 2 turns. This debuff cannot be resisted.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally DEF in all Battles by 25%.

skills.name: Vitality Censure
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Decreases the target’s MAX HP by 30% of the damage inflicted.

skills.name: No Mercy
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 3 times. Damage increase equal to the percentage of HP the target has lost.

skills.name: Tormenting Whispers

skills.name: Final Doom (Passive)
skills.description: Heals this Champion by 30% of their MAX HP each time they kill an enemy. Enemies killed by this Champion cannot be revived.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ATK in all Battles by 33%

skills.name: Molten Pummeling
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 20% chance of decreasing the duration of all buffs by 1 turn.

skills.name: Fearless Charge
skills.description: Places a 60% [Increase DEF] buff on all allies for 3 turns, then attacks 1 enemy. Has a 75% chance of placing a [Stun] debuff for 1 turn. Has a 75% chance of placing a [Stun] debuff for 2 turns instead of the target is under two or more buffs.

skills.name: Battle Storm
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 50% chance of placing a [Provoke] debuff for 1 turn. Also, places a 50% [Decrease ATK] debuff on all enemies for 2 turns if Iron Brago is under an [Increase DEF] buff.

skills.name: Bestow Strength (Passive)
skills.description: Increases the DEF of all allies by 10% of this Champion’s DEF.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally DEF in Doom Tower battles by 34%.

skills.name: Burning Comet
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit transfers a random debuff from this Champion to the target. If this Champion is under any debuffs when attacked, counterattacks with this skill.

skills.name: Calculated Volley
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a [Fear] debuff, a 25% [Decrease C.DMG] debuff, and a 30% [Decrease C.RATE] debuff on all enemies for 2 turns. These debuffs cannot be resisted by enemies who are already under 2 or more debuffs.

skills.name: Finish Them
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Will ignore 25% of the target’s DEF. Will ignore 50% of the target’s DEF instead, if the target is under 2 or more debuffs. Places a [Block Damage] buff on this Champion for 2 turns if this attack kills an enemy.

skills.name: The Immovable (Passive)
skills.description: Whenever an enemy resists a debuff placed by this Champion, the next debuff placed by this Champion cannot be resisted. Each debuff placed by this Champion increases their MAX HP by 3 [stacks up to 30%]

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally HP in All Battles by 28%

skills.name: Gouge
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 20% chance of granting an Extra Turn. Decreases enemy MAX HP by 15% of damage dealt.

skills.name: Outburst
skills.description: Attacks all enemies 3 times. Places a 25% [Weaken] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Extinguish Life
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. This attack is always critical.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally C.RATE in the Arena by 33%.

skills.name: Censer Whirl
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Heals all allies by 5% of this Champion’s MAX HP.

skills.name: Incense of Inspiration
skills.description: Places a 50% [Increase ATK] buff and a 25% [Strengthen] buff on all allies for 2 turns. Fills the Turn Meters of all allies by 15%.

skills.name: Revival Mandate
skills.description: Revives an ally with 50% HP and 50% Turn Meter. Also places a 50% [Increase ATK] buff on that ally for 1 turn. Then activates the revived ally’s default skill, targeting the enemy with the lowest HP.

skills.name: Sentenced to Life (Passive, Cooldown: 4 turns)
skills.description: If an enemy is killed by an ally’s default skill after being revived by the [Revival Mandate] skill, resets the cooldown of the [Revival Mandate] skill.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally SPD in Arena by 25%

skills.name: Razorwheel
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Steals 10% of the target’s Turn Meter. Has a 25% chance of repeating this skill.
