Then applies a [Debuff Spread] effect, taking 2 random debuffs from the target and placing them on all enemies. Damage from the second hit increases by 5% for each debuff transferred, and each debuff applied through the [Debuff Spread] effect.

skills.name: Lacerating Tempest
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Before attacking, removes all buffs from all enemies. Damage increases by 5% for each buff removed. Fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 15% for each enemy killed by this skill.

skills.name: Rev Up The Saw (Passive)
skills.description: At the start of this Champion’s turn, places a 50% [Increase ACC] buff and a 30% [Increase C.DMG] buff on them for 1 turn. At the end of this Champion’s turn, places a 30% [Decrease C.RATE] debuff and a 25% [Decrease C.DMG] debuff on the enemy with the highest C.DMG for 1 turn.

skills.name: Splinter Steel
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. The first hit has a 30% of placing a [Stun] debuff for 1 turn. The second hit has a 30% chance of placing a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Barrier Breach
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Will ignore 20% of each target’s DEF. Has a 75% chance of placing a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff for 2 turns. This debuff cannot be resisted if Alsgor Crimsonhorn is on the same team.

skills.name: Towering Might
skills.description: Attacks all enemies 2 times. Before attacking, places a 30% [Increase C.RATE] buff and a 30% [Increase C.DMG] buff on this champion for 2 turns. Grants an Extra Turn if this attack kills an enemy when Alsgor Crimsonhorn is on the same team.

skills.name: Nowhere To Hide (Passive)
skills.description: Inflicts 20% more damage against targets under [Shield] buffs. Will ignore [Shield] buffs if Alsgor Crimsonhorn is on the same team.

skills.name: Doom Exchange
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Transfers all debuffs from this Champion to the target. Also has a 50% chance of placing a [Stun] debuff for 1 turn.

skills.name: Compound Calamity
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of increasing the duration of all debuffs on all enemies by 1 turn. Also places a [Block Active Skills] debuff and a [Block Buffs] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Power Flare
skills.description: Attacks all enemies 2 times. The first hit has an 80% chance of removing all buffs from all enemies. The second hit has an 80% chance of placing a 50% [Decrease ACC] debuff and a 25% [Decrease C. DMG] debuff for 2 turns. Also places a 25% [Strengthen] buff on all allies for 2 turns.

skills.name: Unchained (Passive, Cooldown: 6 turns)
skills.description: [Passive Effect] This Champion is immune to [Fear], [True Fear], [Freeze], [Provoke], [Sleep], [Stun], and [Petrification] debuffs. [Active Effect] At the end of each enemy or ally turn, removes all [Fear], [True Fear], [Freeze], [Provoke], [Sleep], [Stun], and [Petrification] debuffs from all allies and places a [Block Debuffs] buff for 1 turn on allies who have debuffs removed.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally HP in all battles by 33%.

skills.name: Soul Drinker
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Grants an Extra Turn if this attack kills an enemy

skills.name: Blood Freeze
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Steals 100% of the target’s turn meter. Decreases the cooldown of Oni’s Rage by 1 turn if the target is immune to Turn Meter reduction effects.

skills.name: Oni’s Rage
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Places a 60% [Decrease DEF] and 25% [Weaken] debuff for 2 turns. Will attack 5 times instead of 1 on every 4th use of this skill against the same target in one round.

skills.name: Vigorous (Passive)
skills.description: All Turn Meter fill effects are increased by 50% on this Champion.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ATK in all Battles by 29%

skills.name: Sacred Lance
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Heals all allies. The value of the heal is proportional to their RES and 5% of their MAX HP. Has a 35% chance of applying a [Buff Spread] effect, taking 1 random buff from each ally and placing it on all allies.

skills.name: Symbol of Hope
skills.description: Removes all debuffs from all allies. Then places a 50% [Increase ATK] buff and a 50% [Increase RES] buff on all allies for 3 turns. Also fills the Turn Meters of all allies by 15%.

skills.name: Faith Restored
skills.description: Revives a single ally with 75% HP, and places an [Unkillable] buff on that ally for 2 turns. Then activates an [Instant Turn] effect on the revived ally.

skills.name: Eternally Adored (Passive, Cooldown: 3 turns)
skills.description: [Passive Effect] Increases all allies’ damage against enemies whose RES is lower than theirs by 15%. If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, only one will activate. This skill will not activate on duplicate copies of this Champion, if this particular Champion is dead. [Active Effect] Whenever an enemy is revived, instantly activates the Faith Restored skill on a random dead ally. If no allies are dead, instantly activates the Symbol of Hope skill instead. If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, only one will activate. This skill will not activate on duplicate copies of this Champion, if this particular Champion is dead.

skills.name: Radiant Blades
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. This attack deals single-target damage to each target individually, rather than AoE damage. Whenever this Champion counterattacks, increases the Ignore DEF effect of this skill by 5% (stacks up to 25%). [Passive Effect] Deals double damage when counterattacking.

skills.name: Pierced By Light
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Before attacking, steals 25% of each enemy’s Turn Meter. This effect cannot be resisted. The damage inflicted by this skill increases by 35% against enemies whose RES is lower than this Champion’s. Then places a [Block Damage] buff on this Champion for 2 turns.

skills.name: Seraphic Swoop
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 3 times. Will ignore [Shield], [Block Damage], and [Unkillable] buffs. Will also ignore 35% DEF against targets whose RES is lower than this Champion’s. If the target is killed and has lower RES than this Champion, places a [Block Revive] debuff on them. If the target isn’t killed, grants an Extra Turn instead.

skills.name: Lumaya’s Glory (Passive)
skills.description: Decreases the damage this Champion receives from enemies whose RES is lower than this Champion’s by 15%. Places on this Champion a protected [Counterattack] buff for 1 turn at the end of their turn.

skills.name: Metamorph
skills.description: Transforms this Champion into their Base/Alternate Form. Then grants an Extra Turn.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally RES in All Battles by 80

skills.name: Firecracker
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Heals this Champion by 10% of their MAX HP. If any Timits are on the same team, heals all of them by the same amount.

skills.name: Back With A Bang
skills.description: Revives all dead allies with 50% HP and 50% Turn Meter, then places a 30% [Increase C.RATE] buff and a 30% [Increase C.DMG] buff on them for 2 turns. If Timit the Fool is on the same team and dead, revives them with full HP and a full Turn Meter. If Timit the Fool is on the same team and alive, resets the cooldown and instantly activates their Kegs of Dread skill.

skills.name: Royal Flush
skills.description: Fills the Turn Meter of all allies by 20%. Also removes two random debuffs from each ally. If Timit the Fool is on the same team, removes all debuffs from all allies. Then, places a [Block Debuffs] buff on all allies for 1 turn.

skills.name: Dynamic Duo (Passive)
skills.description: All Turn Meter reduction effects are decreased by 50% when used against this Champion. If Timit the Fool is on the same team, this Champion is immune to Turn Meter reduction effects. If an enemy tries to decrease this Champion”s Turn Meter when Timit the Fool is on the same team, fills this Champion”s Turn Meter by the same percentage instead.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally SPD in All Battles by 19%

skills.name: Oozing Greatsword
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 40% chance of increasing the duration of all [Poison] debuffs on the target by 1 turn. Heals this Champion by 2.5% of their MAX HP for each [Poison] debuff on the target.

skills.name: Corruption Locus
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Places an extra hit for each [Poison] debuff on the target (up to 3 extra hits).

skills.name: Storm of Vitriol
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Damage increases according to the number of [Poison] debuffs on each target.

skills.name: Pestilence (Passive, Cooldown: 1)
skills.description: Places four 5% [Poison] debuffs on all enemies for 2 turns at the start of each round. Has a 50% chance of placing a 5% [Poison] debuff on all enemies for 1 turn at the start of each turn. [Active Effect] Whenever an enemy places a [Poison] debuff on this Champion, instantly removes it and replaces it with a 15% [Continuous Heal] buff for 2 turns instead.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally SPD in all Battles by 19%

skills.name: Bane Hatchet
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit has a 40% chance of stealing 1 random buff from the target.

skills.name: Chaos Tempest
skills.description: Attacks all enemies 3 times. Each hit has a 50% chance of placing one of the following debuffs for 2 turns: a [Block Buffs] debuff, a 50% [Decrease ATK] debuff, a 30% [Decrease SPD] debuff, a 25% [Weaken] debuff, a 50% [Decrease ACC] debuff, or a 100% [Heal Reduction] debuff.

skills.name: No Escape (Passive)
skills.description: Decreases each enemy’s ACC by 10 for each debuff they are under. This Champion will receive 4% less damage for each debuff on the attacker. Heals this Champion by 1,250 HP each time a debuff expires on an enemy. Has a 75% chance of placing a Provoke debuff for 1 turn on enemies under 5 or more debuffs at the start of this Champion’s turn. This Champion can place debuffs on weak hits.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ACC in all Battles by 60.

skills.name: Three Visitations
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 3 times. Each hit has a 20% chance of placing a 25% [Weaken] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Bedevil
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Places a [Stun] debuff for 2 turns. Grants an Extra turn and resets the cooldown of this skill if Yumeko is on the same team and this skill kills an enemy.

skills.name: Suppression Ward
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has an 80% chance of placing a [Block Active Skills] debuff for 2 turns. This debuff cannot be resisted if Yumeko is on the same team.

skills.name: Stoicism (Passive)
skills.description: Damage inflicted by this Champion cannot be decreased by enemy passive skills or masteries, except by the Passive skills of Bosses. Damage inflicted by this Champion cannot be increased by either this Champion’s masteries or ally passive skills. Whenever Yumeko dies, instantly grants a turn to this Champion and resets the cooldowns of each of this Champion’s skills.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally C.RATE in all Battles by 20%

skills.name: Deathknell
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 35% chance of decreasing the duration of all enemy buffs by 1 turn.

skills.name: Canticle of Cold
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a [Hex] debuff and a 25% [Weaken] debuff for 2 turns. If the target is under a [Freeze] debuff, has a 75% chance of placing a [Hex] debuff and a 25% [Weaken] debuff for 3 turns instead.

skills.name: Polar Vortex
skills.description: Places a [Freeze] debuff on all enemies for 1 turn. Fully depletes the Turn Meters of all enemies that receive [Freeze] debuffs from this skill. Fills the Turn Meters of all allies by 10% for each [Freeze] debuff attempt blocked or resisted by the enemy team.

skills.name: Rime Hammer (Passive)
skills.description: Allies will ignore 10% of the target’s DEF if the target is under [Freeze] debuffs. If the [Freeze] debuff was placed by this Champion, allies will ignore 20% of the target’s DEF instead.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally SPD in Arena by 30%

skills.name: Sufferslash
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Has a 50% chance of removing 1 random buff from the target. [Passive Effect] Whenever an enemy hits this Champion or an ally, has a 50% chance to counterattack with this skill. This chance increases by 10% for each debuff on the enemy.

skills.name: Devilish Accord
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Before attacking, swaps HP with an enemy, then steals all buffs from them. Also transfers all debuffs from this Champion to the target, and places a [Seal] debuff on the target for 2 turns. This debuff cannot be removed. This debuff cannot be resisted or blocked if the target has 50% HP or less.

skills.name: Trinity of Pain
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 3 times. The first hit places a [Block Passive Skills] debuff for 2 turns. This debuff cannot be removed. The second hit places a [Block Active Skills] debuff for 2 turns. This debuff cannot be removed. The third hit steals 100% of the target’s Turn Meter.

skills.name: Avatar of Anarchy (Passive)
skills.description: Each hit this Champion deals from skills has a 50% chance of applying a [Debuff Spread] effect, taking 1 random debuff from the target and placing it on all enemies. Whenever this Champion kills an enemy, has a 100% chance of applying a [Debuff Spread] effect, taking all debuffs from the target and placing them on all enemies. This effect cannot be resisted.

skills.name: Demon Stinger
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Heals this Champion by 20% of the damage inflicted. [Passive Effect] Whenever an enemy hits this Champion or an ally, has a 50% chance to counterattack with this skill. This chance increases by 10% for each debuff on the enemy.

skills.name: Singularity of Pain
skills.description: Attack all enemies. Will ignore [Shield] buffs. Will also ignore [Ally Protection] buffs when attacking enemies under 1 or more debuffs, and [Unkillable] buffs when attacking enemies under 2 or more debuffs.

skills.name: Infernal Stars
skills.description: Attacks all enemies 2 times. If a target is killed by this skill while under 3 or more different debuffs, places a [Block Revive] debuff on them. Also heals this Champion by 30% of the damage dealt.

skills.name: Unending Karnage (Passive)
skills.description: This Champion’s C.DMG increases by 1% for every 3 points of ACC they have. Ignores 10% of the target’s DEF for each debuff they are under.

skills.name: Metamorph
skills.description: Transform this Champion into their Base/Alternate Form. Then grants an Extra Turn.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally SPD in Arena by 33%

skills.name: West Wind Rush
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 3 times. Attacks 1 enemy 6 times instead if this Champion has 50% HP or less. Each hit decreases the enemy’s Turn Meter by 7.5% and increases this Champion’s Turn Meter by 7.5%. This effect cannot be resisted if this Champion is under a [Veil] or [Perfect Veil] buff.

skills.name: Spear Of Leonidas
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Before attacking, places a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff and a [HP Burn] debuff on the target for 3 turns. These debuffs cannot be resisted if this Champion is under a [Veil] or [Perfect Veil] buff. Places a [Stun] debuff on all enemies for 1 turn if the damage dealt by this skill is more than 50% of target’s MAX HP. This debuff cannot be resisted if this Champion is under a [Veil] or [Perfect Veil] buff.

skills.name: Isu’s Blessing
skills.description: Removes all debuffs from this Champion, heals them by 50% of their MAX HP, and fills their Turn Meter by 50%. Places a 50% [Increase ATK] buff, a 15% [Shatter] buff, and a 30% [Increase SPD] buff on this Champion for 2 turns. [Passive Effect] Prevents this Champion’s death and keeps them alive on 1 HP if they are under an [Increase ATK] buff, [Shatter] buff, and [Increase SPD] buff.

skills.name: Everything Is Permitted (Passive)
skills.description: Whenever an enemy’s HP drops below 25% after receiving damage from any Assassin, they receive additional bonus damage proportional to this Champion’s ATK. This bonus damage will ignore 100% of the target’s DEF and cannot be critical.

skills.name: Blood Of Sparta (Passive)
skills.description: Whenever this Champion attacks an enemy, increases this Champion’s ATK by an amount equal to 50% of the target’s DEF. Whenever an enemy attacks this Champion, increases this Champion’s DEF by an amount equal to 50% of the attacker’s ATK.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally SPD in all battles by 19%

skills.name: Timbermarket
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Before attacking, removes 1 random buff from the target. This effects cannot be resisted if this Champion is under a [Shield] buff. Places a [Block Revive] debuff if this attack kill an enemy. Increases the value of any [Shield] buffs on this Champion by 30% of the damage dealt. Cannot increase by more than 10,000.

skills.name: Barkbreaker
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Ignores a percentage of each target’s DEF equal to 50% of the difference between this Champion’s MAX HP and any [Shield] on them. Also destroys each target’s MAX HP by 20% of the damage inflicted [stacks up to 50%]. This effect will ignore any [Shield] buffs.

skills.name: Hardy Soul
skills.description: Places a [Shield] buff proportional to this Champion’s DEF and a 25% [Strengthen] buff on all allies for 2 turns. Also places a [Counterattack] buff on this Champion for 2 turns.

skills.name: Mistwood’s Bane (Passive)
skills.description: Removes 1 random debuff from this Champion at the start of their turn. At the start of every 4th turn by this Champion, removes all debuffs from them and places a 60% [Increase DEF] buff on them for 2 turns. Increases this Champion’s DEF by 3% for each debuff removed by this skill [stacks up to 30%].

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally DEF in All Battles by 33%

skills.name: Fiery Rend
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Has a 75% chance of placing a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff for 2 turns. Has a 50% chance of attacking with this skill whenever an enemy has a [HP Burn] debuff activated on them. Occurs once per turn.

skills.name: Searing Brand
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Before attacking, places a [Deathbrand] debuff on the target for 2 turns. Will ignore [Unkillable] and [Shield] buffs, as well as 25% of the target’s DEF. Activates this Champion’s Pyrenei Power skill if the target is killed. If the target survives, fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 50% instead.

skills.name: Pyrenei Power
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Before attacking, places a 50% [Increase ACC] buff on all allies for 2 turns. Has a 75% chance of placing a [HP Burn] debuff on all enemies for 2 turns. Fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 20% for each [HP Burn] debuff placed on enemies, and fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 10% for each [HP Burn] debuff resisted by enemies.

skills.name: Underflame’s Protection (Passive, Cooldown: 4 turns)
skills.description: [Active Effect] Activates a [Delay] effect on this Champion whenever they receive a fatal hit. [Passive Effect] Heals this Champion by 20% of their MAX HP whenever a [HP Burn] debuff is activated on an enemy. Whenever a [HP Burn] debuff on an enemy expires or is removed, places a [True Fear] debuff on that enemy for 1 turn.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ATK in All Battles by 28%

skills.name: Falling Star Crush
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 50% chance of placing a 50% [Decrease ATK] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Smashing Spree
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of decreasing the duration of all enemy buffs by 1 turn. Also has a 75% chance of placing a 50% [Decrease ACC] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Coordinated Defense
skills.description: Places a 50% [Ally Protection] buff on all allies except this Champion for 2 turns. Also places a 60% [Increase DEF] buff on all allies for 2 turns.

skills.name: Besieger’s Bane [Passive]
skills.description: Whenever an ally is attacked while under an [Ally Protection] buff, places a 50% [Decrease ATK] debuff on the attacker for 1 turn.

skills.name: Biting Infestation
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 50% chance of placing a 30% [Decrease SPD] debuff for 2 turns. Steals 5% of each enemy’s Turn Meter. Steals 10% of each enemy’s Turn Meter instead, if they’re under a [Decrease SPD] debuff.

skills.name: Threshmaster
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Puts all of the target’s skills on cooldown. Has a 75% chance of decreasing the Turn Meters of all enemies under a [Sleep] debuff by 15%. Has a 75% chance of decreasing the Turn Meters of all enemies without a [Sleep] debuff by 30% instead.

skills.name: Sleepstingers
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a [Sleep] debuff on all enemies for 1 turn. Will ignore any [Block Debuffs] buffs. Then grants an Extra Turn.

skills.name: Weed Out (Passive, Cooldown: 1 turns)
skills.description: [Passive Effect] Whenever an enemy attempts to increase their Turn Meter, decreases the value of that Turn Meter fill effect by 25%. If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, only one will activate. [Active Effect] Whenever a [Sleep] debuff is removed or expires on a target, instantly activates the [Threshmaster] skill on that target. Does not work if a [Sleep] debuff is removed by damage. If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, only one will activate.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ACC in Arena by 80

skills.name: Flourish of Slaughter
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 50% chance of decreasing each target’s Turn Meter by 10%. Attacks all enemies 2 times instead of 1 and the chance of decreasing each target’s Turn Meter increases to 100% if Minaya is on the same team. The damage of each hit will be decreased by 50%.

skills.name: Beastly Bellow
skills.description: Has a 75% chance of placing a [Provoke] debuff on all enemies for 1 turn. Also places a [Block Debuffs] buff and a 60% [Increase DEF] buff on this Champion for 2 turns. If Minaya is on the same team, the [Provoke] debuff placed by this Champion cannot be resisted. If Minaya is on the same team, also removes all debuffs from all allies and then places a [Block Debuffs] buff and 60% [Increase DEF] buff on all allies for 2 turns.

skills.name: Battle Waltz
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Places a 50% [Decrease ATK] debuff and a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff on all enemies for 2 turns. If Minaya is on the team, these debuffs cannot be resisted.

skills.name: Ferocious Guard (Passive)
skills.description: Counterattacks when hit by enemies under [Decrease ATK], [Decrease DEF], or [Decrease SPD] debuffs. Always counterattacks when hit if Minaya is on the same team.

skills.name: Spectacle (Passive)
skills.description: Places a 60% [Increase DEF] buff on all allies for 2 turns if this Champion kills an enemy.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally RES in All Battles by 80.

skills.name: Tanglestaff
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Places a [Shield] buff for 2 turns on the ally with the lowest HP. The value of the [Shield] is equal to 15% of the ally’s MAX HP

skills.name: Vitriolic Thorns
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has an 80% chance of removing all buffs. Places a 5% [Poison] debuff for 2 turns on each enemy for every buff removed from them. Also has an 80% chance of placing a [Block Buffs] debuff on all enemies for 1 turn.

skills.name: Hypertrophy
skills.description: Removes all debuffs from all allies. Places a 15% [Continuous Heal] buff for 1 turn on each ally for every debuff removed from them. Also places a [Shield] buff on all allies for 2 turns. The value of the [Shield] is equal to 25% of this Champion’s MAX HP

skills.name: Bramble Shaman (Passive)
skills.description: Whenever an enemy under a [Poison] debuff attacks an ally under a [Shield] buff, instantly activates 1 [Poison] debuff on that enemy. Also instantly activates 1 [Continuous Heal] buff on the attacked ally.

skills.name: Gigantic Cleavers
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Has a 35% chance of placing a [Stun] debuff for 1 turn. The chance increases to 75% if the target’s Turn Meter is equal to or below 50%.

skills.name: Hack to Bits
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 4 times. Each hit will ignore 20% of the target’s DEF. Each critical hit has a 50% chance of decreasing the cooldown of Gore Maker skill by 1 turn.

skills.name: Gore Maker
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Will ignore 20% of each target’s DEF. Will ignore a further 5% of DEF for each buff on the target.

skills.name: War Machine (Passive)
skills.description: Increases this Champion’s SPD by 6 (stacks up to 30) and C.DMG by 7% (stacks up to 35%) for each enemy this Champion kills in a Round. Will not reset if this Champion is killed. Whenever an enemy Champion is revived, fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 30% for each revived enemy, then places a 50% [Increase ATK] buff and a 30% [Increase C.DMG] buff on this Champion for 1 turn.

skills.name: Dreadtone
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Transfers all debuffs from this Champion to the target before the attack. Has a 75% chance of placing a [True Fear] debuff for 1 turn. This debuff cannot be resisted by Bosses.

skills.name: Seismic Dissonance
skills.description: Attacks all enemies 2 times. After the first hit, has a 75% chance of placing a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff and a 25% [Weaken] debuff on all enemies for 2 turns. These debuffs cannot be resisted by Bosses. After the second hit, has a 75% chance of placing a 50% [Decrease ACC] debuff and a 50% [Decrease RES] debuff on all enemies for 2 turns. These debuffs cannot be resisted by Bosses.

skills.name: Mindless Muscle
skills.description: Places a [Counterattack] buff on all allies for 2 turns, and an [Unkillable] buff on allies for 1 turn. Also places a [Taunt] buff on this Champion for 2 turns. If a Boss is present in the current Round, these buffs are protected.

skills.name: Drone of Agony (Passive)
skills.description: Whenever this Champion places a debuff on an enemy, deals damage equal to 1% of their MAX HP for each debuff they are currently under. (Stacks up to 10%). Occurs once per skill and once per target.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally DEF in All Battles by 33%

skills.name: Thornblade
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit has a 30% chance of placing a [Provoke] debuff for 1 turn. Each hit also heals the ally with the lowest HP by 3% of this Champion’s MAX HP.

skills.name: Gallant Knave
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of stealing 2 random buffs from each target. Places a 15% [Continuous Heal] buff on all allies except this Champion for 2 turns. Also places an [Unkillable] buff and a [Taunt] buff on this Champion for 2 turns.

skills.name: Stout Defense
skills.description: Swaps HP with a target enemy, and places a 100% [Heal Reduction] on that enemy for 2 turns. This debuff cannot be removed, transferred, or have its duration decreased by enemies. Then equalizes the HP levels of all allies. The HP levels of all allies will be brought up to the level of the ally with the highest HP. Also places a 60% [Increase DEF] buff on all allies for 2 turns.

skills.name: Eternal Sentinel (Passive)
skills.description: At the start of this Champion’s turn, fully restores this Champion’s destroyed MAX HP. When attacked, destroys the attacker’s MAX HP by 20% of the damage received (stacks up to 50%).

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally HP in All Battles by 30%

skills.name: Strength of Lakon
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Destroys 10% of the target’s MAX HP. Destroys 20% of the target’s MAX HP instead if the target is under a [Provoke] debuff (stacks up to 50%). Increases this Champion’s Turn Meter by 20%. Increases this Champion’s Turn Meter by 40% instead if the target is under a [Provoke] debuff.

skills.name: By The Horns
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Will ignore 50% of the target’s DEF and any [Stone Skin] buffs if this Champion’s MAX HP is greater than the target’s. If the target is killed, instantly activates the Hard-earned Confidence skill. If the target survives, heals all allies by an amount equal to the difference between the target’s current HP and MAX HP.

skills.name: Hard-earned Confidence
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 80% chance of placing a [Provoke] debuff on all enemies for 1 turn. Will ignore 50% RES against targets whose MAX HP is lower than this Champion’s. Places a [Counterattack] buff on this Champion for 2 turns.

skills.name: Is That All You’ve Got? (Passive)
skills.description: Enemies under [Provoke] debuffs deal 50% less damage. Allies deal 20% more damage against enemies under [Provoke] debuffs. If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, only one will activate. This skill will not activate on duplicate copies of this Champion, if this particular Champion is dead.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ACC in Arena by 80

skills.name: Stoke Anguish
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit decreases the target’s DEF by 2% (stacks up to 20%). Each hit also steals 10% of the target’s Turn Meter.

skills.name: Agony Overwhelming
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Removes all buffs from all enemies and places a [Block Active Skills] debuff on them for 2 turns. Also steals 20% of the Turn Meter from each enemy under a [Block Active Skills] debuff.

skills.name: Thief of Joy
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Steals 100% of the target’s Turn Meter. Also, puts the target’s skills on cooldown.

skills.name: Dramatis Miserae (Passive)
skills.description: Whenever this Champion loses 30% HP or more in a single turn, deals damage to the attacker equal to 30% of this Champion’s MAX HP. Occurs once per turn. Also when this Champion loses 30% HP or more in a single turn, places a [Shield] buff on them, equal to 30% of this Champion’s MAX HP, for 2 turns.

skills.name: Volatile Performer
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit has a 50% chance of placing a [Bomb] debuff for 2 turns. Heals this Champion by 10% of their MAX HP for each [Bomb] debuff placed.

skills.name: Explosive Showstopper
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Places 2 [Bomb] debuffs on all enemies for 2 turns. Instantly detonates all [Bomb] debuffs on enemies with [Stone Skin] buffs or enemies whose HP is less than this Champion’s HP. Then, places a [Stun] debuff for 1 turn on all enemies who had their [Bomb] debuffs detonated by this skill.

skills.name: Killer Encore
skills.description: Heals this Champion by 50% of their MAX HP. Also places a 25% [Weaken] debuff on all enemies for 2 turns. Then grants an Extra Turn.

skills.name: The Last Laugh (Passive)
skills.description: Has a 100% chance to reflect all [Bomb] debuffs placed on this Champion back to an attacker. Also has a 30% chance to reflect all other debuffs placed on this Champion back to an attacker. Heals this Champion by 20% of their MAX HP whenever an enemy is killed by a [Bomb] debuff.

skills.name: Metamorph
skills.description: Transforms this Champion into their Base/Alternate Form. Then grants an Extra Turn.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ACC in All Battles by 80

skills.name: Sword of Suns
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Places a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff for 2 turns. This debuff cannot be resisted when Vlad the Nightborn is on the same team. Places an extra hit if the target is under any debuff.

skills.name: Rune Shatter
skills.description: Attacks all enemies 2 times. Each hit will ignore 15% of each target’s DEF. Each hit will ignore an additional 10% of each target’s DEF for every [Leech], [Decrease DEF], and [Block Active Skills] debuff they are under. If a target is under [Leech], [Decrease DEF], and [Block Active Skills] debuffs simultaneously, each hit will ignore 75% of their DEF instead.

skills.name: Quietude
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Before attacking, steals all buffs from the target and transfers all debuffs from this Champion to the target. This effect cannot be resisted when Vlad the Nightborn is on the same team. Resets the cooldown of this skill if the target is killed.

skills.name: Exalted (Passive)
skills.description: Enemies from the Undead Horde, Demonspawn, and Knights Revenant Factions killed by this Champion cannot be revived. [All enemies killed by this Champion cannot be revived when Vlad the Nightborn is on the same team.]

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ATK in Arena Battles by 35%

skills.name: Strange Animus
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Heals this champion by 10% of their MAX HP.

skills.name: Bell’s Toll
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of filling the Turn Meters of all allies by 30%. Also has a 75% chance of removing all debuffs from all allies.

skills.name: Conduit of Agonies
skills.description: Places a 50% [Ally Protection] buff on all allies except this champion for 2 turns. Also places a 25% [Strengthen] buff on all allies for 2 turns.

skills.name: Violence Locus (Passive)
skills.description: Increases this champion’s RES by 20 and DEF by 10% for each [Ally Protection] buff on allies. Also increases ally RES by 15 and DEF by 5% for each [Ally Protection] buff on allies. If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, only one will activate. Counterattacks whenever an ally under an [Ally Protection] buff is attacked. Can occur once per enemy turn.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally HP in all battles by 30%.

skills.name: Envenomed Sickles
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit has a 15% chance of increasing the duration of all enemy debuffs by 1 turn. If the 2nd hit does not increase the duration of all enemy debuffs, instantly activates all [Poison] debuffs on the target instead.

skills.name: They Will Regret…
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Before attacking, places a 50% [Increase ACC] buff on this Champion for 2 turns. The first hit has a 75% chance of placing a 25% [Poison Sensitivity] debuff and two 5% [Poison] debuffs for 2 turns. The second hit applies a [Debuff Spread] effect, taking all [Poison] debuffs and the [Poison Sensitivity] debuff from the target and placing them on all other enemies.

skills.name: Toxic Vitriol
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Places a 50% [Decrease ATK] debuff on all enemies for 2 turns. Increases this Champion’s Turn Meter by 20% for each [Decrease ATK] debuff placed. Instantly activates all [Poison] debuffs on all enemies.

skills.name: Imbibed Immunity (Passive)
skills.description: This Champion is immune to [Poison], [Stun], and [Decrease SPD] debuffs. Increases this Champion’s damage dealt by 5% (stacks up to 50%) and Ignore DEF effect by 3% (stacks up to 30%) for each active debuff on the enemy team. Whenever this Champion is attacked by an enemy under a debuff placed by this Champion, counterattacks using their default skill.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ACC in All Battles by 70

skills.name: Witchlight Barrier
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Places a [Shield] buff equal to 10% of this Champion’s MAX HP on the ally with the lowest HP for 2 turns.

skills.name: Blinding Glow
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Places a [Stun] debuff for 1 turn. Has an 80% chance of teaming up with 3 random allies to attack a random enemy. Allies joining the attack use their default skills.

skills.name: War Weirding
skills.description: Places a 50% [Increase ATK] buff and a 30% [Increase C.RATE] buff on all allies for 3 turns, then attack all enemies.

skills.name: Enter the Morass
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 30% chance of placing a 30% [Decrease SPD] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Centuried Vigor
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Places a 50% [Ally Protection] buff on all allies except this Champion for 2 turns. Places two 15% [Continuous Heal] buffs on this Champion for 1 turn. Increases the duration of all ally buffs by 1 turn.

skills.name: Invincible Shell
skills.description: Places a [Provoke] debuff on all enemies for 1 turn. Places a 60% [Increase DEF] buff on this Champion for 2 turns. Places a 30% [Increase SPD] buff on all allies except this Champion for 2 turns.

skills.name: Might of Ages (Passive)
skills.description: At the start of each Round, places a [Shield] buff on all allies for 2 turns equal to 50% of this Champion’s MAX HP. Has a 75% chance of placing a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff and a 50% [Decrease ATK] debuff on the attacker for 1 turn when hit.

skills.name: Hount-Tyrant
skills.description: Attack all enemies. This attack deals single-target damage to each target individually, rather than AoE damage, and will ignore [Reflect Damage] buffs, [Pain Link] debuffs, and [Ally Protection] buffs. This attack also deals double damage when counterattacking if Packmaster Shyek is on the team.

skills.name: Festering Jaw
skills.description: Attack all enemies. Places an extra hit on enemies under 2 or more debuffs. Has a 75% chance of placing a [Leech] debuff and a 25% [Weaken] debuff for 2 turns. These debuffs cannot be resisted if Packmaster Shyek is on the team.

skills.name: Dominant Predator
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Will ignore 50% of the target’s DEF, as well as [Life Barrier] and [Poison Cloud] buffs, and effects that redirect attacks, damage, or debuffs to another target. Repeats this attack once more if Packmaster Shyek is on the team.

skills.name: Primal Amibition (Passive)
skills.description: Increases this Champion’s ATK by 5% when killling an enemy or decapitating a Hydra Head (stacks up to 25%). Increases this Champion’s ATK by 10% when killling an enemy or decapitating a Hydra Head instead if Packmaster Shyek is on the team (stacks up to 50%). Instantly activates the Dominant Predator skill against a Hydra Head, when an ally is consumed by that Head, if Packmaster Shyek is on the team.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ATK in all battles by 30%

skills.name: Meatsplitter
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Attacks all enemies 1 time if the first attack is critical.

skills.name: Gnashing Bog
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Places a [Shield] buff on this Champion for 2 turns, equal to 20% of the damage inflicted. Also heals this Champion by 10% of their MAX HP for each critical hit.

skills.name: Apex Predator
skills.description: Places a 30% [Increase C.RATE] buff and a 30% [Increase C.DMG] buff on all allies for 3 turns, then grants an Extra Turn.

skills.name: Voracious Hunger (Passive)
skills.description: Whenever this Champion attacks, decreases the target’s ATK or DEF by 5%, as well as ACC or RES by 5%, depending on which stat is the highest (stacks up to 30%).

skills.name: Pulverizing Pummel
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 3 times. Each hit has a 30% chance of decreasing the detonation countdown of all [Bomb] debuffs on the target by 1 turn. Also has a 30% chance of placing a [Stun] debuff on the target for 1 turn.

skills.name: Battlefield Sapper
skills.description: Has a 75% chance of placing 2 [Bomb] debuffs on each enemy that detonate after 2 turns. Fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 25% for each enemy with a [Bomb] debuff.

skills.name: Mangonel Maul
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of decreasing the detonation countdown of all [Bomb] debuffs by 1 turn. Also has a 75% chance of placing a [Block Active Skills] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Bomb Breacher (Passive)
skills.description: Fills all allies’ Turn Meters by 5% each time a [Bomb] debuff detonates. Has a 20% chance of activating an [Instant Turn] effect on this Champion whenever an ally or an enemy is killed by a [Bomb] debuff.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ATK in All Battles by 30%

skills.name: Surge Of Chaos
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Heals all allies. The value of the heal is proportional to this Champion’s ATK.

skills.name: Anything For Siroth
skills.description: Removes all debuffs from all allies. Then places a 50% [Increase ATK] buff and a [Shield] buff on all allies for 2 turns. The value of the [Shield] is proportional to this Champion’s ATK.

skills.name: Running Rampant
skills.description: Places a [Taunt] buff and a 25% [Fortify] buff on this Champion for 2 turns. Also places an [Unkillable] buff on all allies except this Champion for 2 turns.

skills.name: Collector Of Pawns (Passive, Cooldown: 4 turns)
skills.description: [Passive Effect] Recieves 15% less damage for each alive ally. [Active Effect] Instantly transforms this Champion into their Alternate Form whenever their last living ally is killed.

skills.name: Destroyer Of All
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 3 times. If this attack kills an enemy, deals pure damage to all other enemies. If the other enemies are not Bosses or Minions, the amount of pure damage dealt is equal to 30% of the initial target’s MAX HP. If the other enemies are Bosses or Minions, the pure damage is dealt equal to 10% of their MAX HP instead. This attack cannot be critical.

skills.name: Icon Of Havoc
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Before attacking, steals all buffs from all enemies. Targets whose ATK is lower than this Champion’s ATK cannot resist this effect. Also places a 25% [Weaken] debuff on all enemies for 2 turns. Targets whose ATK is equal to or lower than this Champion’s ATK cannot resist this effect.

skills.name: Ruthless Agent
skills.description: Places a 15% [Shatter] buff and a 30% [Increase C. RATE] buff on this Champion for 3 turns. Places a [True Fear] debuff on all enemies for 1 turn. Targets whose ATK is equal to or lower than this Champion’s ATK cannot resist this effect. Grants an Extra Turn.

skills.name: Vile Murderess (Passive)
skills.description: Deals 15% more damage for each dead ally. Each critical hit boosts this Champion’s Turn Meter by 10% for each dead ally.

skills.name: Metamorph
skills.description: Transforms this Champion into their Alternate Form. Then grants an Extra Turn.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ATK in All Battles by 35%

skills.name: One-Eyed Beast
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Will place 3 hits if the target is under 3 or more debuffs. Each hit has a 40% chance of placing a 25% [Weaken] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Blood Curdle
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has an 80% chance of placing a 50% [Decrease ATK] debuff for 2 turns. After attacking, has an 80% chance of placing a [HP Burn] debuff for 2 turns on all enemies without [Decrease ATK] debuffs.

skills.name: Kyoku’s Horde
skills.description: Places a 50% [Ally Protection] buff on all allies except this Champion for 2 turns. Also places a [Block Damage] buff on this Champion for 3 turns, then grants an Extra Turn.

skills.name: Wellspring (Passive, Cooldown: 6 turns)
skills.description: Every time this Champion is hit with a critical hit, heals all allies by 15% of their MAX HP, then places a 60% [Increase DEF] buff on all allies for 2 turns.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally DEF in All Battles by 30%

skills.name: Lady’s Touch
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy, then attacks the enemy with the highest Turn Meter. Will attack the same enemy twice if the initial target also has the highest Turn Meter. The second hit has a 50% chance of decreasing the target’s Turn Meter by 15%.

skills.name: Flurry of Petals
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a 50% [Decrease ACC] debuff and a 30% [Decrease SPD] debuff for 2 turns. Also has a 75% chance of decreasing each target’s Turn Meter by 15%.

skills.name: Spirit Flux
skills.description: Removes one random buff from each enemy, then has a 75% chance of placing a [Block Buffs] debuff for 2 turns on enemies who have buffs removed. Also fills the Turn Meters of all allies by 15% and places a 50% [Increase ACC] buff and a 30% [Increase SPD] buff on all allies for 2 turns.

skills.name: Imperious (Passive)
skills.description: Whenever this Champion places a debuff on an enemy, also decreases that enemy’s Turn Meter by 5% for each debuff placed. Whenever this Champion or an ally receives a debuff, fill their Turn Meter by 5% for each debuff received.

skills.name: Aura

skills.description: Whenever an enemy receives a buff, is healed, or has their Turn meter increased, places a 5% [Poison] debuff on that enemy for 2 turns. Will ignore [Block Debuffs] buffs. Increases this Champion’s Turn Meter by 5% for each [Poison] debuff placed.

skills.name: Bellyslash
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 4 times. Each hit will ignore 30% of the target’s DEF. Each hit will also decrease the target’s MAX HP by 25% of the damage inflicted. If the target is not a Boss, also places a [Shield] buff on this Champion equal to 25% of the target’s MAX HP.

skills.name: Cut ‘Em Up
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Deals 100% more damage to enemies under a [Stun], [Sleep], [Freeze], [Provoke], [Fear, [True Fear], or [Petrification] debuffs. If the target is killed, instantly activates the [Feast of Terror] skill.

skills.name: Feast of Terror
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Places a [True Fear] debuff for 2 turns. This debuff cannot be resisted or blocked by enemies with 50% HP or less.

skills.name: Ravenous Hunger (Passive, Cooldown: 2 turns)
skills.description: Whenever this Champion kills an enemy using an active skill, grants this Champion an Extra Turn. Each debuff placed by this Champion in either Form increases this Champion’s HP, ATK and DEF by 2% [stacks up to 50%] and SPD by 2 [stacks up to 50] in their Alternate Form.

skills.name: Metamorph
skills.description: Transforms this Champion into their Base/Alternate Form. Then grants an Extra Turn.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ACC in Arena by 100

skills.name: Blood Harvest
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 3 times. Has a 30% chance of placing a 5% [Poison] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Ghastly Horrors
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 50% chance of placing a [Stun] debuff on all enemies for 1 turn. Places a 30% [Decrease SPD] debuff for 2 turns if the target is not under a [Stun] debuff.

skills.name: Bat Swarm
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Decreases the Turn Meter by 75%.

skills.name: Woodspear
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Places a 50% [Decrease ATK] debuff and a 30% [Decrease C.RATE] debuff on the target for 2 turns. Has a 50% chance that these debuffs cannot be resisted or blocked.

skills.name: Cerulean Guard
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. If the target has 50% HP or less, this attack is always critical and will ignore 50% of the target’s DEF. Places a [Shield] buff on all allies for 2 turns. The value of the [Shield] is equal to the difference between the target’s current HP and the target’s MAX HP. If target is a Boss, the value of the [Shield] is proportional to this Champion’s DEF instead. If the target is killed, also reduces the cooldowns of all ally skills by 2 turns.

skills.name: Jeweled Leaf
skills.description: Heals all allies. The value of the heal is proportional to this Champion’s DEF. Also places a [Block Debuffs] buff and a 50% [Ally Protection] buff on all allies for 2 turns.

skills.name: Shield-Mistress (Passive)
skills.description: Places a [Block Damage] buff on all allies for 1 turn at the start of the Round, and each time this Champion’s HP drops below 50%. If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, only one will activate.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally DEF in All Battles by 35%

skills.name: Swordspear Slash
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit has a 50% chance of increasing the duration of all debuffs on the target by 1 turn.

skills.name: Doom Lantern
skills.description: Places a 50% [Decrease RES] debuff and a [Block Buffs] debuff on all enemies for 2 turns. Also decreases each target’s Turn Meter by 20%.

skills.name: Deathly Apparition
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Removes all buffs from all enemies. Also increases the cooldowns of all enemy skills by 3 turns.

skills.name: Shadowvigil (Passive)
skills.description: Immune to [Stun] debuffs. Increases this Champion’s ACC by 1 for every 2 RES they have.

skills.name: Bladewing
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit has a 50% chance of decreasing the duration of all debuffs on a random ally by 1 turn.

skills.name: Rain of Damnation
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Places a [Block Debuffs] buff and a 50% [Increase RES] buff on all allies for 2 turns. Then, fills the Turn Meters of all allies by 20%.

skills.name: Nightpurge
skills.description: Removes all debuffs from all allies, then decreases the cooldown of all ally skills, except this Champion’s, by 3 turns.

skills.name: Queen of the Dark (Passive)
skills.description: Immune to [Sleep] debuffs. Increases this Champion’s SPD by 1 for every 10 RES they have (stacks up to 50).

skills.name: Metamorph
skills.description: Transforms this Champion into their Base/Alternate Form. Then grants an Extra Turn.

skills.name: Shatterbolt
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 45% chance of placing a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff for 2 turns. Also fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 15% when used against Bosses.

skills.name: Hailburn
skills.description: Attacks 3 times at random. Each hit has a 75% chance of placing [HP Burn] debuff for 3 turns. Also places a [Perfect Veil] buff on this Champion for 2 turns. When used against Bosses, will instantly activate any [HP Burn] debuffs, including [HP Burn] debuffs placed by this Skill.

skills.name: Cyan Slash
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a [Freeze] debuff for 1 turn. When targetting a Boss, will only attack the Boss (not all enemies) and will ignore 50% of the target’s DEF. Will also decrease the cooldown of the Hailburn skill by 1 turn.

skills.name: Escalation (Passive)
skills.description: Increases Ninja’s ATK by 10% (up to 100%) and C.DMG% (up to 25%) each time a single enemy is hit by all three of Ninja’s Active Skills in a single Round. This effect can occur multiple times against the same enemy. When fighting Bosses, will increase Ninja’s ATK by 20% (up to 100%) and C.DMG by 10% (up to 25%) instead.

skills.name: Smell Fear
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 40% chance of decreasing the duration of 2 random buffs on the target by 1 turn. If the target is under a [Fear] or [True Fear] debuff, decreases the duration of all of the target’s buffs by 1 turn instead.

skills.name: Harbinger
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Will ignore 30% of the target’s DEF. Before attacking, if the target is under a [Fear] or [True Fear] debuff, places a 50% [Increase ATK] buff on this Champion for 2 turns. After attacking, if the target is under a [Fear] or [True Fear] debuff, decreases the cooldown of the Dismay skill by 1 turn. Then fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 25%.

skills.name: Dismay
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of stealing 50% of the target’s current Turn Meter. If this attack kills a target under a [Fear] or [True Fear] debuff, decrease the cooldown of the Harbinger skill by 1 turn.

skills.name: Desolation (Passive)
skills.description: Whenever an enemy’s Turn Meter is reduced by any Champion, has a 20% chance of placing a [Fear] debuff on that enemy for 1 turn.

skills.name: Haze of Pain
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 50% chance of placing a 50% [Decrease ACC] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Dreamer’s Demise
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a [Sleep] debuff for 1 turn and two 5% [Poison] debuffs for 2 turns. Passive Effect: Places two additional 5% [Poison] debuffs for 2 turns whenever a [Sleep] debuff placed by this skill is removed or disappears after an enemy takes damage

skills.name: Heady Fumes
skills.description: Places a 50% [Ally Protection] buff on all allies except this champion for 2 turns. Also places a 15% [Continuous Heal] buff on all allies for 2 turns.

skills.name: Somnolence (Passive)
skills.description: Heals this champion by 3% of their MAX HP, and all allies except this champion by 1% of this champion’s MAX HP, every time a [Poison] debuff ticks on an enemy. Whenever an ally is attacked while under an [Ally Protection] buff, has a 40% chance of placing a [Sleep] debuff on the attacker for 1 turn.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally HP in Dungeons by 35%.

skills.name: Brutal Verdict
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Heals this Champion by 10% of their MAX HP. Grants an Extra Turn if this attack kills an enemy.

skills.name: Gore Feast
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. After attacking, this champion sacrifices HP equal to 50% of their MAX HP, then places a 15% [Continuous Heal] buff on all allies for 2 turns. The HP sacrifice will happen even if it kills this Champion.

skills.name: Last Rites
skills.description: Sacrifices HP equal to 50% of this Champion’s MAX HP, then equalises HP levels with the target enemy. Then, grants an Extra Turn. The HP levels of both this champion and the target enemy will be brought down to the level of the one with the lowest HP. [Does not work against bosses. This champion cannot be killed by this skill]

skills.name: Headsman’s Return (Passive, Cooldown: 1 turn)
skills.description: Revives this Champion with 50% HP and full Turn Meter when dead if 3 or more allies are alive. Does not work if there are multiple Nogdars on the team or if there are 3 or fewer total Champions on the team.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases ally ATK in all Battles by 33%

skills.name: Shadestrike
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 50% chance of placing an [Enfeeble] debuff for 2 turns. If the target is a Boss, places a 25% [Weaken] debuff for 2 turns instead. This debuff cannot be resisted if Solanar the Gleaming is on the same team.

skills.name: Umbral Purge
skills.description: Has a 75% chance of removing all buffs from all enemies. This effect cannot be resisted if Solanar the Gleaming is on the same team. Then has a 75% chance of placing a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff on all enemies for 2 turns. This debuff cannot be resisted if Solanar the Gleaming is on the same team. If Solanar the Gleaming is on the same team, also places a 50% [Increase ATK] buff on all allies for 2 turns.

skills.name: Moonbloom’s Blessing
skills.description: Revives all dead allies with 50% HP and 50% Turn Meter. If Solanar the Gleaming is on the same team and is dead, revives them with 100% Turn Meter instead. Places a [Shield] buff on all allies equal to 30% of this Champion’s MAX HP for 2 turns.

skills.name: Scholar Of Shadows (Passive)
skills.description: All Turn Meter fill effects used by enemies are 30% less effective. If Solanar the Gleaming is on the same team, fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 30% of the enemy’s Turn Meter fill effect. If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, only one will activate. This skill will not activate on duplicate copies of this Champion, if this particular Champion is dead. Only counts Turn Meter fill effects from skills.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ACC in all battles by 70

skills.name: Maul
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 55% chance of decreasing the duration of all buffs on the target by 1 turn. Also has an 80% chance of placing a [Block Active Skills] debuff for 1 turn.

skills.name: Ice Pillar
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Places a [Block Buffs] debuff for 2 turns and a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Thick Skin (Passive)
skills.description: Immune to [Stun], [Freeze], [Sleep], [Fear], [True Fear], [Provoke], [Sheep], and [Petrification] debuffs. Decreases the damage taken by all alies that are under 1 or more buffs by 15%. Decreases the damage taken by all allies that are under no active buffs by 25%.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally DEF in Dungeons by 40%.

skills.name: Sting Of Gungnir
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 50% chance of placing a [Berserk] debuff for 2 turns. This debuff cannot be placed on Bosses.

skills.name: Storm Of Familiars
skills.description: Removes all buffs from all enemies. Has an 80% chance of placing a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff on all enemies for 2 turns. Also has an 80% chance of placing a [Stun] debuff on all enemies for 1 turn.

skills.name: Asgardian Judgment
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Before attacking, steals all buffs from the target. This attack will ignore 100% of the target’s DEF. If the target was killed by this skill, revives a random dead ally with 50% HP and 50% Turn Meter. The damage inflicted by this skill depends on the target’s Type: ATK – inflict damage based on the target’s ATK DEF – inflict damage based on the target’s DEF HP/Support/Bosses – inflict damage based on the target’s MAX HP.

skills.name: Odin’s Wisdom (Passive)
skills.description: Every 9 turns, places a [Block Damage] buff on this Champion for 1 turn and also applies a [Buff Spread] effect, taking all buffs from this Champion and placing them on all allies. Note: The 9 turns include the turn taken by this champion, his allies, and enemies. Hence, if you are fighting against enemies who has high speed stats, the faster this passive skill will be able to active this ability!

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Void Ally SPD in arena by 40%

skills.name: Flutter Fluster
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 80% chance of placing [Decrease SPD] debuff for 2 turns. This debuff cannot be resisted if Ultan of the Shell is on the same team.

skills.name: Hand of Spring
skills.description: Heals all allies by 30% of their MAX HP. Increases the duration of all ally buffs by 1 turn.

skills.name: Morphosis
skills.description: Fills the Turn Meters of all allies by 30%. Also places a 50% [Increase RES] buff on all allies for 2 turns.

skills.name: Untrammeled (Paassive)
skills.description: Whenever an ally loses 15% or more of their MAX HP from a single hit, places a 15% [Continuous Heal] buff on that ally for 1 turn. Places a 15% [Continuous Heal] buff for 2 turns on that ally and then instantly activates it if Ultan of the Shell is on the same team. Can occur only once to an ally per turn.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally RES in Dungeons by 75.

skills.name: Exorcism Cutter
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Places an extra hit if the target is under a buff. Places 2 extra hits if the target is under a buff and is from the Undead Hordes Faction. Grants an Extra Turn if this attack kills an enemy. Occurs once per skill.

skills.name: Violent Purification
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Before each hit, destroys the target’s MAX HP by 10% (stacks up to 50%). This effect does not work against Bosses. The damage inflicted by this skill increases by 10% for each buff and debuff on the target (stacks up to 100%). If the target is killed by this skill, places a [Block Revive] debuff.

skills.name: Final Vengeance
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Will ignore 50% of the target’s DEF, as well as [Stone Skin], [Shield], and [Strengthen] buffs.

skills.name: Onryo’s Duty (Passive)
skills.description: Whenever this Champion attacks, all enemies, except the initial target, receive damage equal to 25% of the damage dealt to the initial target. This extra damage will ignore 100% of each enemy’s DEF. The extra damage cannot be critical and will not trigger counterattacks.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ATK in Arena by 35%

skills.name: Paired Hammers
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit has a 50% chance of decreasing the target’s Turn Meter by 10% and a 50% chance of filling this Champion’s Turn Meter by 10%.

skills.name: Rally the Tribe
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Heals all allies by 20% of this Champion’s MAX HP. Heals all allies under [Continous Heal] buffs by 30% instead.

skills.name: Clan Mentor
skills.description: Removes all [Block Buffs] and [Heal Reduction] debuffs from all allies, then places two 15% [Continuous Heal] buffs and a [Block Debuffs] buff on all allies for 2 turns. Also has a 75% chance of removing 1 random debuff from all allies.

skills.name: Paternal (Passive)
skills.description: Each time a [Continuous Heal] buff heals an ally, it fills that ally’s Turn Meter by 10%. If there are multiple Champions in the team with this skill, only one will activate.

skills.name: Obsidian Blade
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 50% chance of increasing the cooldown of a random active skill on the target by 2 turns. Also fills the Turn Meters of all allies by 10%.

skills.name: Magicks of Ireth
skills.description: Has a 75% chance of removing all buffs from all enemies. Decreases the Turn Meters of all enemies whose Turn Meter is equal to or lower than 50% by 20%. If an enemy’s Turn Meter is more than 50% full, decreases it to 50% instead. Has a 75% chance of placing a [Stun] debuff for 1 turn on enemies whose Turn Meter was reduced to 50%.

skills.name: To Death, Unsurrendered
skills.description: Teams up with all allies to attack a single enemy. The allies joining the attack will use their default skills. Before attacking, places a 50% [Increase ATK] buff and a 7.5% [Shatter] buff on all allies for 2 turns. Decreases the cooldowns of all allies’ active skills, except this Champion’s, by 1 turn if the target is killed.

skills.name: Dark Whisperings (Passive, Cooldown: 4 turns)
skills.description: [Passive Effect] Allies inflict 20% more damage against enemies under [Stun] debuffs. [Active Effect] Whenever an ally is killed, instantly activates the Magicks of Ireth skill. Will not put the skill on cooldown. If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, only one will activate.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally SPD in Arena by 28%

skills.name: Kill Command
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 50% chance of placing a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff for 2 turns. Then, teams up with any ally Terrorbeasts, Goremasks, Hounds Spawns, Hellfangs, Fellhounds & Stitched Beasts to attack. The allies joining the attack will use their default skills.

skills.name: Pack Alpha
skills.description: Removes all debuffs from this Champion and heals them by 50% of their MAX HP. Then, places a [Shield] buff on this Champion for 2 turns. The value of the [Shield] is equal to any surplus heal. The [Shield] buff cannot be removed, stolen, or transferred if at least one Terrorbeast, Goremask, Hounds Spawn, Hellfang, Fellhound, or Stitched Beast is on the same team. Finally, places a [Taunt] buff and a 30% [Reflect Damage] buff on this Champion for 2 turns. These buffs cannot be removed, stolen, or transferred if at least one Terrorbeast, Goremask, Hounds Spawn, Hellfang, Fellhound, or Stitched Beast is on the same team.

skills.name: Blood Howl
skills.description: Fills the Turn Meters of all allies by 25%. Also has an 80% chance of placing a [Block Buffs] debuff on all enemies for 2 turns. This debuff cannot be resisted if at least one Terrorbeast, Goremask, Hounds Spawn, Hellfang, Fellhound, or Stitched Beast is on the same team.

skills.name: We Hunt As One (Passive)
skills.description: When attacked, places a [Hex] debuff on the attacker for 1 turn. Ally attacks on targets under a [Hex] debuff placed by this Champion deal 20% more damage. When this Champion is attacked, all ally Terrorbeasts, Goremasks, Hounds Spawns, Hellfangs, Fellhounds, Stitched Beasts, and Krokhad the Throatripper will counterattack.

skills.name: Wavethrust
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 3 times. Each hit has a 50% chance of stealing 5% of the target’s Turn Meter. Fills all allies’ Turn Meters by an amount equal to the total amount of Turn Meter stolen.

skills.name: Rip Current
skills.description: Removes all buffs from all enemies. Then has a 75% chance of placing a 30% [Decrease SPD] debuff and a 25% [Weaken] debuff on all enemies for 2 turns.

skills.name: Relentless Tide
skills.description: Has a 75% chance of placing a [Block Passive Skills] debuff and an [Enfeeble] debuff on a target enemy for 2 turns. Also steals all Turn Meter from the target.

skills.name: Crushing Depths (Passive)
skills.description: Places a 100% [Ensnare] debuff on the enemy with the lowest Turn Meter for 2 turns at the end of this Champion’s turn. This debuff cannot be resisted. Whenever an enemy has their Turn Meter increased by a skill, also fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 15%. Occurs once per turn.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally SPD in Arena by 28%

skills.name: Triumphant Blow
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 75% chance of placing a 50% [Decrease ATK] debuff for 2 turns. This debuff cannot be resisted or blocked if the target is under a [HP Burn] debuff.

skills.name: Gorgoa’s Bane
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Will ignore 50% of the target’s DEF if the target is under a [HP Burn] debuff. The damage inflicted by this skill increases by 10% for every turn remaining on any debuffs on this Champion and the target (stacks up to 200%). If the damage inflicted by this skill is less than 50% of the target’s MAX HP, steals all buffs from the target and places a [Stun] debuff on them for 2 turns. These effects cannot be resisted if the target is under a [HP Burn] debuff.

skills.name: Victor’s Bounty
skills.description: [Active Effect] Places a 50% [Increase ATK] buff and a [Magma Shield] buff on all allies for 2 turns. The value of the [Magma Shield] is equal to 30% of this Champion’s MAX HP. Also places a [Taunt] buff on this Champion for 2 turns. [Passive Effect] Decreases the damage all allies receive by 20% while this Champion is not under a [Decrease DEF] debuff.

skills.name: Master Of Games (Passive)
skills.description: This Champion is immune to [Stun], [HP Burn], and [Petrification] debuffs. Whenever an enemy attacks this Champion, has a 100% chance of placing a [HP Burn] debuff on that enemy for 2 turns. The chance decreases to 50% if this Champion is under a [Decrease DEF] debuff. Occurs once per enemy skill. Whenever an enemy attacks this Champion, also has a 50% chance of placing a [Petrification] debuff on that enemy for 1 turn. The chance decreases to 25% if this Champion is under a [Decrease DEF] debuff. Occurs once per enemy skill.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally RES in All Battles by 60

skills.name: Zephyr Lance
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit heals all allies by 5% of this Champion’s MAX HP. Each hit also has a 75% chance to fill the Turn Meter of the ally with the lowest Turn Meter by 10%.

skills.name: On Teal Wings
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Before attacking, removes all buffs from all enemies. Then has a 75% chance of placing a [Block Buffs] debuff and a 30% [Decrease SPD] debuff on all enemies for 2 turns. Also fills the Turn Meters of all allies by 15%.

skills.name: Sky Mirage
skills.description: Places a 50% [Increase RES] buff and a [Perfect Veil] buff on all allies, except this Champion, for 2 turns. Decreases the cooldown of all ally active skills, except this Champion’s, by 3 turns. The cooldown of this skill cannot be decreased by other cooldown decreasing effects.

skills.name: Dracospeed (Passive)
skills.description: Turn Meter fill effects on allies under [Stun], [Freeze], [Sleep], [Provoke], [Fear], [True Fear], [Petrification], or [Sheep] debuffs are 30% more effective. Whenever a [Sheep] debuff is removed or expires on an ally, heals that ally by 25% of their MAX HP and places a 30% [Increase SPD] buff on them for 1 turn. If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, only one will activate.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally RES in All Battles by 80

skills.name: Hammer of Stone
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 80% chance of decreasing the target’s Turn Meter by 15%.

skills.name: Good Shepherd
skills.description: [Active Effect] Places a 60% [Increase DEF] buff and a [Shield] buff on all allies for 2 turns. The value of the [Shield] is proportional to this Champion’s DEF. These buffs are protected if there are any dead allies when this skill is used. [Passive Effect] Instantly activates this skill whenever an ally is killed. Instantly activating this skill will not put it on cooldown and will work even when this skill is on cooldown. If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, only one will activate. This skill will not activate on duplicate copies of this Champion, if this particular Champion is dead.

skills.name: Smash and Stomp
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 75% chance of placing a [Stun] debuff for 2 turns. Also has a 75% chance of fully decreasing the target’s Turn Meter. If the [Stun] debuff was successfully placed on the initial target, then attacks all enemies except the initial target. Has a 75% chance of placing a [Stun] debuff on all enemies for 1 turn. Also has a 75% chance of decreasing all enemies’ Turn Meters by 25%.

skills.name: Vengeful Quest (Passive)
skills.description: Increases this Champion’s DEF by 3% (stacks up to 30%) and MAX HP by 5% (stacks up to 50%) for each [Stun] debuff successfully landed by this Champion. Allies are immune to [Stun] debuffs while under a [Shield] buff placed by this Champion’s Good Shepherd skill.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally DEF in All Battles by 30%

skills.name: Burning Zeal
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Places an extra hit if the target is under any debuffs. Has a 25% chance of granting an Extra Turn.

skills.name: Faithful Conflagration
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 3 times. Each hit will ignore 25% of the target’s DEF. Each hit will ignore 50% of the target’s DEF instead if the target is under a [HP Burn] debuff or a [Freeze] debuff. Each hit also destroys the target’s DEF and RES by 3% [Stacks up to 30%]. Places a [HP Burn] debuff on all enemies for 2 turns, if the target is kill by this skill. This debuff cannot be resisted.

skills.name: Pyro Maxima
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. This attack deals single-target damage to each target individually, rather than AoE damage. Will ignore [Shield], [Block Damage], and [Unkillable] buffs. Instantly activates any [HP Burn] debuffs on all enemies. Places a [Block Revive] debuff on targets that are killed while under a [HP Burn] debuff or a [Freeze] debuff.

skills.name: Elemental Mistress (Passive)
skills.description: This Champion deals 25% more damage against enemies under a [HP Burn] debuff or a [Freeze] debuff. This Champion deals 100% more damage against enemies under both [HP Burn] and [Freeze] debuffs. This Champion ignores the damage reduction granted by [Freeze] debuffs.

skills.name: Glacial Carve
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Places a 50% [Ally Protection] buff on a random ally, except this Champion, for 2 turns. If the randomly selected ally is already under an [Ally Protection] buff, places it on another randomly selected ally. Heals this Champion and any allies under [Ally Protection] buffs. The value of the heal is proportional to this Champion’s DEF.

skills.name: Frozen Tendrils
skills.description: Places a [Block Debuffs] buff and a 25% [Strengthen] buff on all allies for 2 turns. Places a 100% [Ensnare] debuff on all enemies for 2 turns. This debuff cannot be resisted by enemies under a [HP Burn] debuff or a [Freeze] debuff.

skills.name: Iceblade Tempest
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Before attacking, places 1 [Intercept] stack on all allies. Places a [Freeze] debuff on all enemies for 1 turn. This debuff cannot be resisted.

skills.name: Cyromatic Revival (Passive)
skills.description: [Passive Effect] Allies under a [Freeze] debuff receive 90% less damage. If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, only one will activate. [Active Effect] Once per Round, revives each ally, including this Champion, with 100% HP. Places a [Freeze] debuff on the revived ally for 1 turn. This debuff cannot be resisted or blocked.

skills.name: Metamorph
