skills.name: Spurn Oblivion (Passive)
skills.description: Will decrease damage from a single enemy hit so that incoming damage will not exceed 50% of this Champion’s MAX HP from that hit. Can occur once per enemy attack. Grants an Extra Turn if this damage reduction occurs. [Does not work against Bosses] Decreases the damage taken from Bosses by 15%. Decreases the damage taken from Bosses by 30% if Siphi the Lost Bride is on the same team. Note: With Patch 4.50, Rotos’s Spurn Oblivion skill will not be triggered if he receive damage more than 50% of his MAX HP when he has sufficient Shield buff to mitigate those damage inflicted by the enemy unless the enemy attack ignore’s shield!

skills.name: Chroma Shift
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 10%. Also places a [Perfect Veil] buff on this Champion for 1 turn if this attack is critical. If this Champion is under a [Veil] or [Perfect Veil] buff, fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 20% instead.

skills.name: Jungle Ambush
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 50%. Has a 75% chance of placing a [Stun] debuff on the target for 1 turn when attacking while under a [Veil] or [Perfect Veil] buff. Has a 75% chance of placing a [Sleep] debuff on the target for 1 turn when attacking without a [Veil] or [Perfect Veil] buff. Places a [Perfect Veil] buff on this Champion for 2 turns after attacking without a [Veil] or [Perfect Veil] buff. Will ignore [Shield], [Strengthen], and [Unkillable] buffs.

skills.name: Flicker Step
skills.description: (While under a [Veil] or [Perfect Veil] buff) Attacks all enemies. Before attacking, has a 75% chance of placing a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff and a 25% [Weaken] debuff. Decreases the cooldown of the Jungle Ambush skill by 2 turns. Will ignore [Block Debuffs], [Shield], and [Strengthen] buffs. (While not under a [Veil] or [Perfect Veil] buff) Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 75% chance of placing a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff and a 25% [Weaken] debuff on the target for 2 turns before attacking. Places a [Perfect Veil] buff on this Champion for 2 turns after attacking.

skills.name: Chameleon (Passive)
skills.description: Places a [Block Debuffs] and a 50% [Increase ATK] buff on this Champion for 1 turn, and a 15% [Continuous Heal] buff for 2 turns whenever they receive a [Veil] or [Perfect Veil] buff. Places a protected [Perfect Veil] buff on this Champion for 1 turn whenever an enemy receives a buff from skills. If the target’s MAX HP is higher than this Champion’s, will ignore 15% of the target’s DEF. If the target’s MAX HP is more than double this Champion’s, will ignore 30% of the target’s DEF instead.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally C.RATE in Doom Tower battles by 23%.

skills.name: Confident Shot
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Places a 50% [Increase ATK] buff on this Champion for 2 turns if this attack is critical.

skills.name: Slaughter Volley
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Places a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff on the target for 2 turns if this attack is critical.

skills.name: Dead Aim
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Will ignore DEF by 100%.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Spirit Ally ATK in all Battles by 38%

skills.name: Vile Arrows
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 50% chance of placing a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff for 2 turns. Transfers a random debuff from this Champion to the target if the target is under a [Hex] debuff.

skills.name: Unleash the Hunt
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Places an extra hit on enemies under [Hex] debuffs. Will ignore 25% of each target’s DEF if there are 4 or more enemies are under [Hex] debuffs.

skills.name: Stalk Prey
skills.description: Places a 50% [Increase ACC] buff on allies for 2 turns, then places a [Hex] debuff on all enemies for 2 turns. Also places a [Perfect Veil] buff on this Champion for 2 turns and fills this Champion Turn Meter by 50%.

skills.name: Marked Quarry [Passive]
skills.description: Decreases the speed of enemies under [Hex] debuffs by 5% and decreases the RES of those enemies by 10%. Also increases the damage enemies under [Hex] debuffs receive by 10% and decreases the value of heals they receive by 30%. These effects do not stack if there are multiple Ruel the Huntmaster on the same team.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally C.RATE in all battles by 20%

skills.name: Hypnotic Bladework
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Places a [Sleep] debuff on the target for 1 turn. Instantly activates this skill against the enemy with the highest Turn Meter whenever an enemy’s Turn Meter is increased by a skill. Occurs once per turn.

skills.name: Perfection in Motion
skills.description: Attacks all enemies 2 times. Each hit steals all buffs from all enemies. Then applies a [Buff Spread] effect, taking all buffs from this Champion and placing them on all allies.

skills.name: Sneer of Disdain
skills.description: Attacks all enemies 2 times. Each hit increases the cooldown of 1 of each enemy’s skills to the maximum. Also decreases the Turn Meters of all enemies by 30%. Then grants an Extra Turn.

skills.name: Is That… It? (Passive)
skills.description: This Champion receives no damage when attacked by enemies, including Bosses and their minions, out of their active turn. All allies except this Champion deal 3% more damage for each enemy skill that has had its cooldown increased by this Champion (stacks up to 25%). If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, only one will activate. This skill will not activate on duplicate copies of this Champion, if this particular Champion is dead.

skills.name: Wrath of Superiority
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 3 times. Will ignore [Block Damage] and [Unkillable] buffs. Instantly activates this skill against an enemy whenever that enemy receives a [Block Damage] or [Unkillable] buff, or has their death prevented by themselves or allies. Occurs once per turn.

skills.name: Pinions of Wrath
skills.description: Attacks all enemies 2 times. Before attacking, swaps HP with a target enemy. For this skill, increases this Champion’s ATK and decreases all enemies’ DEF by a percentage equal to the percentage of HP swapped.

skills.name: You Will Weep
skills.description: Attacks all enemies 2 times. Will ignore 25% of the target’s DEF. Before attacking, decreases the value of any [Stone Skin], [Shield], and [Magma Shield] buffs by 75%. This effect cannot be resisted if target has any skills on cooldown. Places a protected [Shield] buff on this Champion for 2 turns. The value of the [Shield] is proportional to this Champion’s ATK.

skills.name: Behold My Majesty (Passive)
skills.description: This Champion’s attacks are always critical against enemies that have any skills on cooldown. This Champion’s skills deal 3% more damage for each turn of cooldown remaining on all enemy skills.

skills.name: Unbearable Assault
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Has a 50% chance of placing a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff for 2 turns after the first hit. Places an extra hit if the [Decrease DEF] debuff is placed.

skills.name: Enduring Warrior
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Before attacking, places a 50% [Increase ATK] buff and a 30% [Increase C.DMG] buff on this Champion for 2 turns if this Champion’s DEF is higher than the target’s DEF. Decreases the cooldown of this Skill by 1 turn if the target has more than 50% HP after the attack.

skills.name: Army Breaker
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy, then attacks all enemies except the initial target if there are 3 or more enemies alive. Inflicts 20% more damage on the first hit if the target has a higher MAX HP than this Champion.

skills.name: Vendetta (Passive)
skills.description: Will ignore 7.5% of enemy DEF for each time this Champion attacks the same target enemy in consecutive attacks or Turns. Stacks up to 30%. The stack will be lost and reset if this Champion targets and attacks a different enemy.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ATK in Dungeons by 30%

skills.name: Crystal Flesh
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Heals by 15% of the damage inflicted if this champion has 50% HP or less. Fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 15% if he has more than 50% HP.

skills.name: Emerald Curse
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Inflicts bonus damage equal to the difference in HP levels between this Champion and the target (+1% damage for every 1% difference). Inflicts bonus damage equal to the difference in the number of buffs on this champion and the target (+10% damage per buff).

skills.name: Boon Supervision
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has an 80% chance of stealing 2 random buffs before attacking. Places an extra hit on enemies that have any buffs left.

skills.name: Diamond Skin (Passive, Cooldown: 4 turns)
skills.description: Passive Effect: Places a [Block Damage] Buff on this champion for 1 turn at the start of each round. Active Effect: Blocks incoming damage and places a [Block Damage] Buff on this champion for 1 turn when they receive a hit that would drop their HP below 30%

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally HP in all Battles by 30%

skills.name: Vanity Fists
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit has a 35% chance of placing a [Stun] debuff for 1 turn.

skills.name: Explosive Temper
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Removes all [Increase DEF] buffs from enemies before attacking. Places an extra hit if this attack kills an enemy.

skills.name: Roar of Victory
skills.description: Places a 50% [Increase ACC] buff on all allies for 3 turns. Also places a 30% [Increase C.DMG] buff on this champion for 3 turns, then grants an extra turn.

skills.name: Affronted (Passive)
skills.description: Decreases the damage this champion receives from critical hits by 20%. Counter attacks the attacker when hit with a critical hit. Has a 50% chance of counterattacking the attacker when hit with a strong, normal, or weak hit.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally DEF in all battles by 30%.

skills.name: Hematic Blades
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 3 times. Each hit has a 33% chance of granting an Extra Turn. Cannot gain more than one Extra Turn.

skills.name: Sanguine Fissure
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Will ignore 33% of the target’s DEF. Will ignore 99% of the target’s DEF, [Stone Skin] and [Block Damage] buffs instead if this skill is used on a Turn number that is divisible by 3. If the target is killed, increases the cooldowns of all enemy skills by 3 turns. This effect cannot be resisted if this skill is used on a Turn number that is divisible by 3.

skills.name: Gorescream
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Before attacking, removes all buffs from all enemies. This effect cannot be resisted by enemies with a number of buffs that is divisible by 3. Will attack all remaining enemies with less than 66% HP. Grants an Extra Turn if this Champion is under a number of buffs that is divisible by 3.

skills.name: Say Her Name (Passive)
skills.description: Each subsequent hit from this Champion deals 33% more damage (stacks up to 99%). Resets after the 99% damage bonus is applied. Each subsequent hit this Champion receives deals 33% less damage (stacks up to 99%). Resets after the 99% damage reduction is applied. Whenever an enemy is revived, revives this Champion with 33% HP and 66% Turn Meter. After being revived, places a [True Fear] debuff on all enemies for 2 turns. This debuff cannot be resisted or blocked.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ATK in All Battles by 33%

skills.name: Drake’s Swiftness
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 20% chance of placing a 30% [Decrease SPD] debuff for 2 turns. Also has a 30% chance of decreasing the target’s Turn Meter by 15%.

skills.name: Wingbeat Flurry
skills.description: Attacks all enemies 2 times. Each hit has a 20% chance of placing a [Stun] debuff for 1 turn.

skills.name: Phoenix Rite
skills.description: Revives an ally with 50% HP and places a 50% [Ally Protection] buff on them for 2 turns.

skills.name: Boundless Life (Passive)
skills.description: Heals all allies by 10% of their MAX HP at the start of each turn. Also places a 30% [Increase SPD] buff on a random ally for 2 turns.

skills.name: Conflagrate
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 3 times. Each hit has a 30% chance of increasing the duration of any [HP Burn] debuffs on the target by 1 turn. Each hit also has a 50% chance of decreasing the duration of a random buff on the target by 1 turn. If the target is under a [HP Burn] debuff, the chance increases to 100%.

skills.name: Forest Fire
skills.description: Has an 80% chance of placing a [HP Burn] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Blazing Panic
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a 30% [Decrease SPD] debuff for 2 turns. If a target is under a [HP Burn] debuff, also has a 75% chance of placing a [Hex] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Stoked (Passive)
skills.description: Whenever this Champion is attacked by an enemy under a [HP Burn] debuff, heals this Champion for 25% of all damage received and heals all allies by 10% of the damage received. Also has a 35% chance to instantly activate any [HP Burn] debuffs on the attacker.

skills.name: Amberthrust
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 50% chance to instantly activate a [Continuous Heal] buff on each ally.

skills.name: Touch of Gold
skills.description: Places a 30% [Increase SPD] buff and two 15% [Continuous Heal] buffs on all allies for 2 turns. Also fills the Turn Meters of all allies by 20%.

skills.name: Edge of Death
skills.description: Revives all dead allies with 50% HP and 50% Turn Meter. Then, teams up with all allies revived by this skill to attack the enemy with the lowest HP. The allies joining the attack will use their default skills.

skills.name: Healing Glow (Passive)
skills.description: Whenever a [Continuous Heal] buff activates on any ally, fills the Turn Meters of all allies by 5%. At the end of this Champion’s turn, increases the duration of a [Continuous Heal] buff on a random ally except this Champion for 1 turn.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally SPD in All Battles by 19%

skills.name: Behead
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Will ignore 30% of the target’s DEF. Grants an Extra Turn and resets the cooldown on this Champion’s Holy Sword skill if the target is killed. The cooldown will be reset even if this attack is a counterattack.

skills.name: Holy Sword
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Will ignore [Shield] and [Block Damage] buffs. Damage increases according to enemies’ MAX HP.

skills.name: Giant Killer (Passive)
skills.description: Has a 30% chance of increasing the duration of all debuffs on the target by 1 turn whenever this Champion attacks. This effect cannot be resisted. The damage inflicted by this Champion’s skills increases by 30% if the enemy’s MAX HP is higher than this Champion’s MAX HP.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ATK in all Battles by 30%

skills.name: Put to Flame
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 50% chance of placing a [HP Burn] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Lordly Embrace
skills.description: Removes all debuffs from a target ally, then places a [Block Debuffs] buff for 2 turns and heals that ally by 75% of their MAX HP. Heals all other allies by 20% of their MAX HP and fills their Turn Meters by 15% if the target is fully healed by this Skill.

skills.name: Aggress
skills.description: Has a 75% chance of removing all buffs from all enemies, then decreases the Turn Meters of all enemies by 10% and fills the Turn Meters of all allies by 10%. Decreases the Turn Meters of all enemies by 20% and fills the Turn Meters of all allies by 20% if 5 or more buffs were removed.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Magic Ally RESIST in all Battles by 50.

skills.name: Luck Swap
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit has a 60% chance of removing 1 random buff from the target. If a buff is removed, has a 35% of stealing that buff.

skills.name: Lucky Charms
skills.description: Places a 60% [Increase DEF] buff on all allies for 2 turns. Places a 30% [Increase SPD] buff on all allies with more than 50% HP for 2 turns. Also has a 50% chance of placing a 30% [Increase C.RATE] buff on those allies for 2 turns. Places a [Revive On Death] buff on all allies with less than 50% HP for 2 turns. Also has a 50% chance of placing a 15% [Continuous Heal] buff on those allies for 2 turns.

skills.name: Uncatchable
skills.description: Places a 30% [Decrease SPD] debuff on all enemies for 2 turns. Decreases the Turn Meter of all enemies by 15%. Fills the Turn Meters of all allies by 15% if any enemy’s Turn Meter is below 50%.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ACC in all Battles by 70

skills.name: Bring to Ruin
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each Hit has a 30% chance of placing a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Caryatid’s Curse
skills.description: Transfers all debuffs from this Champion to a target enemy, then attacks that enemy 3 times. The first hit increases the duration of all debuffs on the target by 1 turn. The second hit decreases the duration of all buffs on the target by 1 turn. Also increases the duration of all buffs on this Champion by 1 turn after attacking.

skills.name: Humbled and Broken
skills.description: Attacks all enemies 2 times. The first removes all buffs. The second hit will ignore 20% of the target’s DEF against targets that have no active buffs.

skills.name: Mana Seeker (Passive)
skills.description: Increases this Champion’s ACC by 10 for each buff on each enemy. Increases this Champion’s C.DMG by 5% for each debuff on each enemy. Stacks up to 100%

skills.name: Bolts of Cold
skills.description: Attacks 3 times at random. Has a 25% chance of placing a [Freeze] debuff for 1 turn.

skills.name: Rejuvenating Wave
skills.description: Heals 1 ally by 50% and other allies by 20% of their MAX HP. Places a 15% [Continuous Heal] buff for 2 turns on targets with full HP.

skills.name: Ice Storm
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has an 80% chance of placing a [Freeze] debuff for 1 turn. Fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 10% for each attacked enemy.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally DEF in Faction Crypts by 33%.

skills.name: Rage of Saki
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 3 times. The second and third hits of this skill will ignore 5% and 10% of the target’s DEF respectively. The second and third hits of this skill will deal 10% and 20% more C.DMG respectively.

skills.name: Shadow Shinobi
skills.description: Attacks all enemies 2 times. Each critical hit destroys the enemy’s DEF by 5% (stacks up to 30%). Each critical hit also increases this Champion’s MAX HP by 5% (stacks up to 30%). Each hit has a 75% chance of placing a [Leech] debuff for 2 turns. This debuff cannot be resisted if this Champion is under a [Veil] or a [Perfect Veil] buff.

skills.name: This Is True Ninjutsu
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Before attacking, steals all buffs from a single target enemy. This effect cannot be resisted if this Champion is under a [Veil] or a [Perfect Veil] buff. Fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 15% for each buff stolen. Will ignore 15% of each enemy’s DEF, as well as [Shield] and [Block Damage] buffs. If this Champion is under a [Veil] or [Perfect Veil] buff, will ignore 30% of each enemy’s DEF instead.

skills.name: Dimensional Tyrant (Passive, Cooldown: 1 turns)
skills.description: [Passive Effect] Decreases all incoming damage by 30%. This damage is split equally among all allies, except this Champion. Increases this Champion’s damage dealt by 15% for each dead ally. [Active Effect] Whenever this Champion loses 20% of their MAX HP in one attack, has a 100% chance to [Evade] the next attack. When this guaranteed [Evade] effect activates, places a [Perfect Veil] buff on this Champion for 2 turns and has a 50% chance of placing a [True Fear] debuff on all enemies for 1 turn. The [True Fear] debuff cannot be resisted.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally HP in All Battles by 33%

skills.name: Spear of Providence
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 30% chance of placing a [Block Active Skills] debuff for 2 turns. Also has a 80% chance to steal 20% of the target’s Turn Meter if the target is already under a [Block Active Skills] debuff.

skills.name: Purging Petals
skills.description: Target an ally. If the target ally is not under a [Sheep] debuff, places a 50% [Increase ATK] buff, a 30% [Increase C.RATE] buff, and a 30% [Increase C.DMG] buff on them for 2 turns. Then activates a [Give Extra Turn] effect on the target ally. If the target is under [Sheep] debuff, removes it from them.

skills.name: Charge of the Valorous
skills.description: Fills the Turn Meters of all allies by 20% and places a 30% [Increase SPD] buff on them for 2 turns. Also has a 100% chance of decreasing the Turn Meter of all enemies by 20% and placing a 30% [Decrease SPD] debuff on them for 2 turns.

skills.name: Sovereign Sight (Passive)
skills.description: Increases this Champion’s ACC equal to the amount of SPD they have.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally SPD in Arena battles by 30%

skills.name: Towering Inferno
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 3 times. Each hit has a 15% chance of increasing the duration of [HP Burn] debuffs on the target by 1 turn.

skills.name: Flame Eruption
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has an 80% chance of placing a 25% [Weaken] debuff for 2 turns. Also has an 80% chance of placing a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff for 2 turns if there are a least 2 enemies under [HP Burn] debuffs. Then instantly activates any [HP Burn] debuffs on each target and decreases the duration of those [HP Burn] debuffs by 1 turn.

skills.name: Firestorm Rite
skills.description: Places a [HP Burn] debuff on this champion for 3 turns, then attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a [HP Burn] debuff on all enemies for 3 turns. Grants an Extra Turn if a [HP Burn] debuff is placed on all enemies.

skills.name: Metaphysics (Passive)
skills.description: Increases this champion’s SPD by 3 and damage inflicted by 3% for each ally and enemy under a [HP Burn] debuff. If Cardiel is on the team, all allies will heal by 3% of their MAX HP from [HP Burn] debuffs instead of receiving damage and losing HP.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ACC in all Battles by 60

skills.name: Excoriating Edge
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. The first hit transfers all debuffs from this Champion to the target. The second hit then increases the duration of all debuffs on the target by 1 turn.

skills.name: Seraphic Wave
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Each critical hit fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 25%. Resets the cooldown of the Rage of the Nephilim skill if this attack kills an enemy. Resets the cooldown of all of this Champion’s skills if this attack kills 2 or more enemies.

skills.name: Rage of the Nephilim
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Ignores 50% of the target’s DEF. Will attack all remaining enemies with any surplus damage if the initial target is killed. Fully heals this Champion if the initial hit kills an enemy.

skills.name: Stay the Blade (Passive, Cooldown: 3 turns)
skills.description: If this Champion is about to get killed by a fatal hit, blocks incoming damage and places a [Block Damage] buff on this Champion for 2 turns. Then, heals this Champion by 50% of their MAX HP and fills their Turn Meter by 100%.

skills.name: Metamorph (Passive, Cooldown: 4 turns)
skills.description: Transforms this Champion into their Alternate Form, whenever their last living ally is killed. Then grants an Extra Turn.

skills.name: Burn It Out
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Heals all allies by 20% of the damage inflicted.

skills.name: Nephilic Ward
skills.description: Removes all debuffs from all allies. Then heals all allies by 30% of their MAX HP and places a [Block Debuffs] buff on them for 2 turns.

skills.name: Light of the Beyond
skills.description: Revives all dead allies with 50% HP and 50% Turn Meter, then places a [Block Damage] buff on all allies for 2 turns.

skills.name: Shield of Defiance (Passive)
skills.description: Decreases damage taken from skills by 20%.

skills.name: Metamorph
skills.description: Transforms this Champion into their Base Form. Then grants an Extra Turn.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ATK in all battles by 35%.

skills.name: Fairer Fight
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Removes any [Shield] buffs. Also has a 50% chance of removing one random buff. Has a 75% chance instead when attacking Bosses.

skills.name: Battlefield Beacon
skills.description: Attacks all enemies 2 times. Each hit has a 50% chance of placing a [Provoke] debuff for 1 turn, and a 75% chance of placing a 50% [Decrease ATK] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Shield of the Realm
skills.description: Places a [Shield] buff on all allies for 2 turns equal to 30% of this Champion’s MAX HP. Also places a 25% [Strengthen] buff on all allies for 2 turns.

skills.name: Equitable (Passive)
skills.description: Whenever this Champion is attacked, has a 20% chance of decreasing the duration of all buffs on the attacker by 1 turn. Has a 40% chance instead when attacked by a Boss.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally DEF in Doom Tower battles by 40%.

skills.name: Curse of Longing
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has an 80% chance of placing a [Sleep] debuff for 1 turn if the target’s Turn Meter is equal to or above 50%. This debuff cannot be resisted. Heals all allies by 5% of their MAX HP if the target’s Turn Meter is below 50%.

skills.name: Whirlwind Romance
skills.description: Places a [Block Debuffs] buff on all allies for 2 turns, then fills the Turn Meters of all allies by 10% and places a 60% [Increase DEF] buff and a 30% [Increase SPD] buff on all allies for 2 turns.

skills.name: Love Beyond Death
skills.description: Revives a single ally with 55% HP and a full Turn Meter. Places a 50% [Increase ATK] buff and a 30% [Increase C.RATE] buff on that ally for 2 turns.

skills.name: Eternal Bond (Passive)
skills.description: Heals each ally by 10% of their MAX HP at the start of their turn. Has a 40% chance of removing [Freeze] and [Fear] debuffs from each ally at the start of their turn. Removes all debuffs from Rotos the Lost Groom at the start of their turn if they are on the same team.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally RESIST in all Battles by 80.

skills.name: Boreal Blade
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 65% chance of placing a [Freeze] debuff for 1 turn. This debuff cannot be resisted. If Lady Noelle is on the same team, the chance increases to 100% and the debuff cannot be blocked or resisted.

skills.name: Polar Protection
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Will ignore 30% of each target’s DEF if Lady Noelle is on the same team. Places a 25% [Strengthen] buff and a [Shield] buff on all allies for 2 turns. The value of the [Shield] is equal to 30% of the damage inflicted.

skills.name: Goodwill
skills.description: Places an [Unkillable] buff and a 15% [Continuous Heal] buff on all allies for 2 turns. Also places a [Counterattack] buff on this Champion for 2 turns. If Lady Noelle is on the same team, also places a [Taunt] buff on this Champion for 2 turns.

skills.name: Winter’s Warden (Passive)
skills.description: Enemy Ignore DEF effects used against allies under [Shield] buffs are decreased by 30%. Enemy Ignore DEF effects used against Lady Noelle while she’s under a [Shield] buff are decreased by 60%.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally HP in all Battles by 33%.

skills.name: Hand of Doom
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 30% chance of stealing 1 random buff from each enemy.

skills.name: Command
skills.description: Places a 50% [Increase ATK] buff and a 30% [Increase C.RATE] buff on all allies for 2 turns.

skills.name: Rebirth
skills.description: Removes all debuffs from all allies, then heals all allies and fills their Turn Meters. The amount by which each ally is healed increases according to the number of debuffs removed. The amount by which each ally’s Turn Meter is filled increases according to the number of debuffs removed.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally SPD in Dungeons by 33%.

skills.name: Havoc Scythe
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit has a 75% chance of increasing the duration of a random debuff on the target by 1 turn.

skills.name: Skull Comet
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 75% chance of placing a [Petrification] debuff on the target for 1 turn. If the target is a Boss, places a 50% [Decrease ATK] debuff and a 30% [Decrease SPD] debuff for 2 turns instead. Whenever a [Petrification] debuff is removed or expires on an enemy, has a 50% chance to place a 30% [Decrease SPD] debuff on that enemy for 1 turn.

skills.name: Begone, Fools!
skills.description: Places a 50% [Increase ACC] buff on all allies for 2 turns. Also has a 75% chance to steal any [Block Debuffs] buffs and one other random buff from each enemy. Then decreases all enemies’ Turn Meters by 15%. If an enemy is from the Telerian League, decreases that enemy’s Turn Meter by 30% instead.

skills.name: Master of Evil (Passive)
skills.description: Whenever this Champion attempts to place a debuff, steal a buff, decrease an enemy’s Turn Meter, or increase the duration of a debuff on an enemy, increases this Champion’s ACC by 20 for each buff on that enemy. Whenever this Champion is hit, has a 40% chance to place a 50% [Decrease RES] debuff on the attacker for 1 turn. The chance increases to 75% against Champions from the Telerian League.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ACC in All Battles by 60

skills.name: Hexpyre
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 50% chance of applying a [Debuff Spread] effect, taking a [Hex] debuff and placing it on all enemies. If the target isn’t under a [Hex] debuff, will spread one other random debuff instead.

skills.name: Anathema Burst
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Before attacking, places a 50% [Increase ATK] buff on this Champion for 2 turns. Repeats the attack on all enemies under a [Hex] debuff. This attack will ignore [Shield] buffs against targets under a [Hex] debuff.

skills.name: Infernal Malediction
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Before attacking, places a [Hex] debuff on all enemies for 2 turns. The damage inflicted by this skill increases by 20% for each [Hex] debuff placed. Stacks up to 100%. Heals this Champion by 20% of their MAX HP for each [Hex] debuff resisted or blocked.

skills.name: Halfspawn (Passive)
skills.description: Fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 10% when attacking targets without a [Hex] debuff. Will ignore 15% of a target’s DEF when they are under a [Hex] debuff.

skills.name: Gleeful Ripping
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 5%. Has a 30% chance to repeat this skill. Each hit places a 100% [Heal Reduction] debuff on the target for 2 turns. This debuff cannot be resisted if there is at least 1 ally Champion from the Lizardmen Faction on your team.

skills.name: Skull Claim
skills.description: Has a 75% chance of placing a [Provoke] debuff on a target for 1 turn. This debuff cannot be resisted if there is at least 1 ally Champion from the Lizardmen Faction on your team. Places a 25% [Strengthen] buff on all allies for 2 turns.

skills.name: Abyssal Clutch
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a 50% [Decrease ATK] debuff for 2 turns. This debuff cannot be resisted if there is at least 1 ally Champion from the Lizardmen Faction on your team.

skills.name: Horrific Foe (Passive)
skills.description: When attacked, decreases the attacker’s MAX HP by 5%. Decreases the MAX HP of Bosses by 2.5% instead (except the Scarab King, whose MAX HP will be decreased by 5%). Cannot decrease a single enemy’s MAX HP by more than 50%. Occurs once per enemy attack. Has a 50% chance of placing a [True Fear] debuff on targets any destroyed MAX HP.

skills.name: Skull Brood (Passive, Cooldown: 3 turns)
skills.description: At the start of this Champion’s turn, revives a random ally from the Lizardmen Faction with 50% HP and 50% Turn Meter.

skills.name: Misery Morningstar
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 50% chance of placing a 50% [Decrease ATK] debuff for 2 turns. If the target is under a [Leech] debuff, has a 100% chance of placing a 50% [Decrease ATK] debuff on the target for 2 turns before attacking.

skills.name: Cloying Horror
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a 30% [Decrease SPD] debuff for 2 turns. Also places a [Shield] buff on all allies equal to 30% of this Champion’s MAX HP for 2 turns. The [Shield] buff cannot be removed if it is placed when there are any enemies under [Leech] debuffs.

skills.name: Vermin Vitae
skills.description: Places a 50% [Ally Protection] buff on all allies except this Champion for 2 turns. Also places a 30% [Reflect Damage] buff on all allies for 2 turns, then heals this Champion by 50% of their MAX HP.

skills.name: Soul Rot (Passive)
skills.description: Whenever an ally under a [Reflect Damage] buff is attacked, place a [Leech] debuff on the attacker for 1 turn. Reflects 50% of the damage this Champion receives back to the attacker. Increases the amount of damage reflected by 20% from [Reflect Damage] buffs placed by this Champion.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally HP in all Battles by 33%

skills.name: Solar Surge
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. This attack is always critical if Noluda the Gloaming is on the same team. Has a 60% chance of placing a [Fatigue] debuff on all enemies for 1 turn. [Passive Effect] Has an 80% chance to counterattack with this skill whenever an enemy gets an Extra Turn or has an Instant Turn effect activated. Has a 15% chance to counterattack with this skill whenever an enemy has their Turn Meter increased.

skills.name: Blazing Force
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. This attack is always critical if Noluda the Gloaming is on the same team. Will ignore 10% of the target’s DEF for each buff on this Champion. This Champion is immune to all debuffs while this skill is not on cooldown. Whenever an enemy attempts to place a debuff on this Champion while this skill is not on cooldown, this Champion gains a random buff instead.

skills.name: Unfettered Radiance
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Before attacking, steals all buffs and 100% Turn Meter from the target if they are not under a [Stone Skin] buff. This effect cannot be resisted. This attack is always critical if Noluda the Gloaming is on the same team. Will ignore [Stone Skin] buffs. This Champion receives 75% less damage on enemy Extra Turns or Instant Turns while this skill is not on cooldown. While this skill is on cooldown, reduces the cooldown by 1 whenever an enemy receives an Extra Turn, has an Instant Turn effect activated on them, or has their Turn Meter increased. Occurs once per turn.

skills.name: Scholar Of Sun (Passive)
skills.description: Whenever an enemy receives healing, has a 100% chance to reduce the amount of healing received to zero. This Champion will receive that healing instead. If Noluda the Gloaming is on the same team, enemies will receive damage equal to the amount of healing instead. Once per Round, if this Champion is dead, revives this Champion with 100% HP and 100% Turn Meter when their last living ally is killed. Then places a [Magma Shield] buff on this Champion for 2 turns. The value of the [Magma Shield] is equal to 300% of this Champion’s MAX HP. If Noluda the Gloaming is on the same team, this buff is protected.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ATK in all battles by 33%

skills.name: Bewildering Blow
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 35% chance of placing a [Stun] debuff for 1 turn. Will ignore 30% of the target’s DEF if the target is under a [Provoke] debuff.

skills.name: Wave of Despair
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance to remove all buffs. Also has a 75% chance to place a 50% [Decrease ATK] debuff and a [Hex] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Reign of Terror
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Increases the duration of all debuffs on each target by 1 turn, then places a [Provoke] debuff on all enemies for 1 turn. Places a [Shield] buff on all allies for 2 turns equal to 30% of damage inflicted, and a [Counterattack] buff on this Champion for 2 turns. Damage increases by 10% for each debuff on the target.

skills.name: Foul Provocation (Passive)
skills.description: Will ignore 30% of a target’s RES if the target’s DEF is lower than this Champion’s. Allies deal 25% more damage to targets under a [Provoke] debuff placed by this Champion. If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, only one will activate. This skill will not activate on duplicate copies of this Champion, if this particular Champion is dead.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally DEF in All Battles by 33%

skills.name: Axe of Glory
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. If the target is under any debuff, each hit decreases the target’s Turn Meter by 10%.

skills.name: Drakehunter
skills.description: Attacks all enemies 2 times. Each hit has a 50% chance of placing a [Stun] debuff for 1 turn.

skills.name: Dragon Heart
skills.description: Places a 60% [Increase DEF] buff on this champion for 3 turns, then attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a 25% [Decrease C.DMG] debuff for 2 turns on enemies whose ATK is higher than their DEF. Has a 75% chance of placing a 30% [Decrease SPD] debuff for 2 turns on enemies whose ATK is equal to or lower than their DEF.

skills.name: Untarnished (Passive)
skills.description: Whenever an enemy attempts to place a [Weaken] debuff, a [Decrease DEF] debuff, or a [Poison] debuff on this champion, reflects them back onto the attacker. Damage increases by 5% for each debuff on the target.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally DEF in all Battles by 30%

skills.name: Astral Storm
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Fills the Turn Meters of all allies by 10%. Also fills the Turn Meter of each ally by an extra 5% if they have any active buffs placed on them by this Champion.

skills.name: Stellar Embryo
skills.description: Removes all debuffs from all allies, then heals them by 25% of this Champion’s MAX HP. Also fills the Turn Meters of all allies by 15%, and places a [Block Debuffs] buff on them for 2 turns.

skills.name: Part the Veil
skills.description: Revives all dead allies with 50% HP and 50% Turn Meter. Also places a [Perfect Veil] buff on all allies, except this Champion, for 2 turns.

skills.name: Eternal Beyonder (Passive, Cooldown: 3 turns)
skills.description: [Passive Effect] This Champion receives 5% less damage for each 100 RES on this Champion (stacks up to 25%). [Active Effect] Prevents this Champion’s death and keeps them alive on 1 HP when hit by a fatal hit, then equalizes their HP. The HP level of this Champion will be brought up to the average HP level of the team.

skills.name: Uncreation Beam
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Decreases the Turn Meters of all enemies by 10%. Decreases the Turn Meter of each enemy by an extra 5% if they are under a [Block Active Skills], [Decrease RES], or [Stun] debuff placed by this Champion.

skills.name: Eclipse Rend
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Before attacking, removes all buffs from all enemies. Then, places a [Block Active Skills] debuff for 2 turns. This attack will not trigger counterattacks.

skills.name: Dark Nebula
skills.description: Places a 50% [Increase ACC] buff on all allies for 2 turns. Then, places a 50% [Decrease RES] debuff on all enemies for 2 turns, and a [Stun] debuff on all enemies for 1 turn.

skills.name: Starlight Reflect (Passive, Cooldown: 3 turns)
skills.description: [Passive Effect] Increases this Champion’s ACC equal to 75% of their RES when placing debuffs or activating instant effects. [Active Effect] If an enemy’s ACC is higher than this Champion’s RES, has a 50% chance of transferring any [Fear], [True Fear], [Freeze], [Provoke], [Sleep], [Stun], or [Petrification] debuffs back to the enemy when placing these debuffs on this Champion.

skills.name: Metamorph
skills.description: Transforms this Champion into their Base/Alternate Form. Then grants an Extra Turn.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally RES in All Battles by 80

skills.name: Doom Flasks
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit has a 25% chance of increasing the duration of all [Poison] and [HP Burn] debuffs on the target by 1 turn.

skills.name: Volatile Mixture
skills.description: Attacks all enemies 2 times. The first hit instantly activates all [Poison] and [HP Burn] debuffs on all enemies, and all [Continuous Heal] buffs on allies. The second hit has a 75% chance of destroying each target’s MAX HP by 3% for each [Poison] and [HP Burn] debuff activated on them by this skill [stacks up to 60%]. Then fills the Turn Meters of all allies by 20%.

skills.name: Vengefire Flood
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has an 80% chance of placing two 5% [Poison] debuffs on all enemies for 2 turns. If the target is under a [HP Burn] debuff, places three 5% [Poison] debuffs and a 25% [Weaken] debuff on them for 2 turns instead. Also places two 15% [Continuous Heal] buffs on all allies for 2 turns.

skills.name: Rigged To Blow (Passive)
skills.description: The damage inflicted by [Poison] and [HP Burn] debuffs will ignore [Block Damage] and [Unkillable] buffs. Whenever allies attack enemies with destroyed MAX HP, increases the damage dealt by 10%. If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, only one will activate.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally SPD in all battles by 20%

skills.name: Fulminant Rupture
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 75% chance of placing a [Provoke] debuff and an [Enfeeble] debuff on the target for 1 turn. Also has a 25% chance that these debuffs cannot be resisted. If each enemy has a number of buffs that is equal to or less than this Champion’s, attacks all enemies instead. This attack is always critical. Has a 75% chance of placing a [Provoke] debuff and an [Enfeeble] debuff on all enemies for 1 turn. Also has a 25% chance that these debuffs cannot be resisted.

skills.name: Eye of the Storm
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Before attacking, places a 60% [Increase DEF] buff and 1 [Stormcall] stack on all allies. This attack is always critical if the number of buffs on the target is equal to or less than this Champion’s. Will ignore [Stone Skin] buff and 50% of the target’s DEF if this number of buffs on the target is equal to or less than this Champion’s. If this attack kills the target, decreases the Turn Meters of all other enemies by an amount equal to the Turn Meter that the target had.

skills.name: Sky-Father’s Boon
skills.description: Places a 30% [Increase C.RATE] buff, a [Block Damage] buff, and a [Counterattack] buff on a target ally for 2 turns. Fills the Turn Meters of all allies by 25%.

skills.name: Boltmaster (Passive)
skills.description: Whenever an ally under a [Stormcall] stack placed by this Champion lands a critical hit, this Champion deals additional pure damage to the target. If the target is not a Boss or a minion, the pure damage dealt is equal to 2% of the target’s MAX HP for each buff on this Champion (stacks up to 10%). If the target is a Boss or a minion, the pure damage dealt is equal to 3% of the target’s MAX HP. This damage cannot be critical. Occurs once per skill and once per target. Does not count as an extra hit. This pure damage ignores [Shield], [Block Damage], and [Strengthen] buffs. If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, only one will activate. This skill will not activate on duplicate copies of this Champion, if this particular Champion is dead.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally SPD in All Battles by 24%

skills.name: Doubleslash
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit has a 35% chance of placing a [Provoke] debuff for 1 turn. When counterattacking, the chance increases to 50%

skills.name: Hindrance
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Before attacking, has a 75% chance of decreasing the duration of all enemy buffs by 1 turn. Has a 75% chance of placing a 30% [Decrease SPD] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Flawless Strategem
skills.description: Places a 50% [Ally Protection] buff on all allies except this Champion for 2 turns, and places a 60% [Increase DEF] buff on all allies for 2 turns. Also places a [Counterattack] buff on this Champion for 2 turns. Then, places a [Shield] buff on this Champion for 2 turns. The value of the [Shield] is proportional to this Champion’s DEF.

skills.name: Protect The Troops (Passive)
skills.description: Whenever this Champion is attacked, heals themselves by 1% for each 500 DEF this Champion has. Heals all other allies under [Ally Protection] buffs placed by this Champion by 30% of this skill’s initial heal.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ACC in all battles by 60.

skills.name: Volcanic Rend
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 15%. Also fills the Turn Meters of all allies, except this Champion, by 10%, when attacking a target under [HP Burn] debuff.

skills.name: Blazing Barrier
skills.description: Places a [HP Burn] debuff on all enemies for 3 turns, and instantly activates any [HP Burn] debuffs on all enemies. Then places a [Shield] buff on all allies for 2 turns equal to the damage inflicted by the [HP Burn] activation. The value of the [Shield] buff cannot exceed 25,000 HP.

skills.name: Rise From Ash
skills.description: Revives all dead allies with 50% HP and 40% Turn Meter. Grants an Extra Turn.

skills.name: Pyroclastic Boon (Passive)
skills.description: Fills the Turn Meters of all allies by 5% for each [HP Burn] debuff placed. Whenever a [HP Burn] debuff is activated, heals all allies by 5% of their MAX HP. Whenever a [HP Burn] debuff is activated on Skavag, Tainted Skavag, Spiderlings, or Tainted Spiderlings, heals all allies by 1% of their MAX HP. Whenever a [HP Burn] debuff is removed from an enemy, places a 50% [Decrease RES] debuff on that enemy for 1 turn. Whenever an ally is killed by an enemy under a [HP Burn] debuff, fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 20%. Increases this champions SPD by 7 for each active [HP Burn] debuff.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally HP in all Battles by 33%

skills.name: Gotcha!
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 25% chance of placing a [Stun] debuff for 1 turn. The chance increases to 50% if the target has any buffs.

skills.name: Staff Of Wonder
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Will ignore 50% of the target’s DEF. Will attack all remaining enemies with any surplus damage if the target is killed. This attack will also ignore 50% of the target’s DEF. This attack cannot be critical. If the initial target survives, places a [Sheep] debuff on them for 1 turn. This debuff cannot be blocked.

skills.name: Now You See Us
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Before attacking, steals all buffs from all enemies and then places a [Block Buffs] debuff on them for 2 turns.

skills.name: Unbeatable Wukong (Passive)
skills.description: Revives this Champion with 100% HP and 100% Turn Meter 3 turns after they were killed.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally SPD in Arena battles by 28%

skills.name: Exemplar of Stoicism
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. If there are any enemies under a [Freeze] debuff, also attack them. Decreases the enemy ATK by 3% whenever this Champion hit an enemy with this skill (stacks up to 30%). Also increases this champion’s ATK by 3% whenever they hit an enemy with this skill (stacks up to 30%)

skills.name: Cold Company
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Before attacking, has a 100% chance of placing a [Freeze] debuff for 1 turn. Will ignore [Strengthen], [Ally Protection], and [Unkillable] buffs, as well as 20% of the target’s DEF when attacking enemies under a [Freeze] debuff.

skills.name: Ever Faithful
skills.description: Places a 50% [Increase ATK] buff, a 30% [Increase C.RATE] buff, a [Shield] buff, and a 50% [Increase ACC] buff on this Champion for 3 turns, then grants an Extra Turn. The value of the [Shield] is proportional to this Champion’s ATK.

skills.name: Frosty Glare (Passive)
skills.description: Has a 15% chance of placing a [Freeze] debuff on attackers for 1 turn when hit while under a [Shield] buff. Has a 35% chance of placing a [Freeze] debuff on all enemies for 1 turn whenever a [Shield] buff on this champion is removed by damage.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ATK in Arena battles by 35%

skills.name: Exemplar Of Strikes
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit transfers a random debuff from this Champion to the target.

skills.name: Let None Live
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Damage increases by 10% for each debuff on each target. Resets the cooldown of the [Crack Shot] skill if this attack kills an enemy.

skills.name: Crack Shot
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Will ignore [Ally Protection], [Strengthen], and [Shield] buffs. Grants an Extra Turn if this attack kills an enemy.

skills.name: Implacable (Passive)
skills.description: Immune to [Decrease ATK] debuffs. Inflicts 20% more damage against targets whose ATK is lower than this Champion’s ATK.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ATK in all battles by 30%

skills.name: Exemplar of Rage
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit has an extra 10% chance of inflicting a critical hit. Each hit also has a 40% chance of increasing the duration of any [HP Burn] debuffs on the target.

skills.name: Bloodshed Tempest
skills.description: Attacks 4 times at random. Places a 50% [Increase ATK] buff on this champion for 3 turns before attacking. Each hit has an extra 10% chance of inflicting a critical hit. Each hit also has a 75% chance of instantly activating any [HP Burn] debuffs on each target and decreasing the duration of those [HP Burn] debuffs by 1 turn. Fills this champion’s Turn Meter by 30% if 3 or more [HP Burn] debuffs are activated during the attack.

skills.name: Unreasoning Outburst
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has an extra 10% chance of inflicting a critical hit. Has a 75% chance of placing [HP Burn] and [Block Buffs] debuffs for 2 turns. Also places a 30% [Decrease SPD] debuff on targets whose Turn Meter is higher than 50%

skills.name: Laugh at Danger (Passive, Cooldown: 4 turns)
skills.description: Whenever this champion receives a [Fear], [True Fear], [Freeze], [Provoke], [Sleep], [Stun] or [Petrification] debuff, instantly removes it. Then fully heals this champion, and grants an extra turn.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increase Ally ATK in all battles by 33%

skills.name: Exemplar of Skill
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 50% chance of placing a 25% [Weaken] debuff for 2 turns. This debuff cannot be resisted.

skills.name: Putrescene
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing three 5% [Poison] debuffs for 2 turns. These debuffs cannot be resisted. Also increases the duration of all enemy debuffs by 1 turn. This effect cannot be resisted.

skills.name: Arcane Havoc
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Places a 50% [Increase ACC] buff on all allies for 2 turns before attacking. Also has a 75% chance of placing a 50% [Decrease RES] debuff on all enemies for 2 turns. This debuff cannot be resisted. Fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 10% for each [Decrease RES] debuff placed by this skill

skills.name: Degrade (Passive)
skills.description: Decreases each target’s ACC, C.RATE, and C.DMG by 3% for each [Poison] debuff on them. If there are multiple champions on the team with this skill, only one will activate.

skills.name: Temporal Nova
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 35% chance of placing a 30% [Decrease SPD] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Hex of Years
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 70% chance of placing a 25% [Weaken] debuff for 2 turns. Also has a 45% chance of placing a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Banish From Time
skills.description: Removes [Shield], [Block Damage], and [Unkillable] buffs from all enemies, then attack them. Places a 100% [Heal Reduction] debuff on all enemies for 2 turns. The buff removal cannot be blocked or resisted.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ATK in all Battles by 33%

skills.name: Chitin Cutter
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 75% chance of stealing 1 random buff from the target. This effect cannot be resisted or blocked.

skills.name: Ravening Multitude (4 turns)
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Grants an Extra Turn if this attack kills an enemy. If the initial target survives, places an extra hit on all enemies.

skills.name: Insectoid Feast (4 turns)
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. The damage inflicted by this skill increases by 10% each time an enemy receives a debuff. The damage increase resets each time this skill is used.

skills.name: Swarm Conductor (Passive)
skills.description: Will ignore 12% of each target’s DEF if they have no buffs. ★★★ Dark Elves Unity ★★★ 1 Faction Ally: Allies receive 15% less damage from enemies that have any buffs. Allies receive 30% less damage from enemies that have no buffs. 2 Faction Ally: When this Champion or an ally removes or steals a buff from an enemy, this Champion’s next skill will deal 50% more damage. 3 Faction Ally: At the start of each round, places a [Block Buffs] debuff on all enemies for 1 turn. This debuff cannot be resisted.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally SPD in All Battles by 19% Increases Ally ACC in All Battles by 60 for Dark Elves.

skills.name: Fleshcleaver
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 80% chance of placing a 50% [Decrease ATK] debuff and a [Pain Link] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Brutal Decapitator
skills.description: Attacks all enemies 2 times. The first hit has a 75% chance of placing a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff for 2 turns. The second hit has a 75% chance of placing a 30% [Decrease SPD] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Bond of the Enslaved
skills.description: Places a 60% [Increase DEF] buff and a 30% [Increase SPD] buff on all allies for 2 turns. Also places a 50% [Ally Protection] buff on all allies except this Champion for 2 turns.

skills.name: Earned Resilience (Passive)
skills.description: Decreases the damage this Champion receives by 10% for each ally under an [Ally Protection] buff. This Champion is immune to [Pain Link] debuffs, as well as any damage from [Reflect Damage] buffs or passive Reflect Damage effects.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally DEF in All Battles by 30%

skills.name: Shatter Upon Us
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Has a 40% chance of placing a 50% [Decrease ATK] debuff for 2 turns. Each critical hit fills the Turn Meters of all allies by 5%

skills.name: Hero’s Intercession
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Places a [Stun] debuff for 2 turns. Deals double damage to enemies whose ATK is equal to or higher than this Champion’s ATK. [Passive Effect] Whenever an enemy attacks Marichka the Unbreakable, attacks that enemy using this skill.

skills.name: Constant Pressure
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Damage increases by 15% for each buff on allies. Then increases the duration of all ally buffs by 1 turn. Heals this Champion by 5% for every buff that had its duration increased. Restores decreased MAX HP equal to the amount of any surplus heal.

skills.name: Fierce Battler (Passive)
skills.description: [Passive Effect] When attacked, decreased the enemy’s ATK by 10% (up to 50%; 25% against Bosses). Occurs once per skill. ATK Reduction resets after each Round. [Active Effect] Places a [Fear] debuff on all enemies from the Orcs, Ogryn Tribes, Undead Hordes, and Demonspawn Factions at the beginning of each Round. This debuff cannot be resisted.

skills.name: Poise (Passive)
skills.description: All incoming damage from skills is reduced by 50%. When attacked, this Champion’s MAX HP will be decreased by 25% of the attack’s initial damage (before the damage reduction).

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally C.RATE in all Battles by 24%

skills.name: Transference Slash
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit transfers a random debuff from this Champion to the target. Fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 5% for each transferred debuff.

Places a 50% [Increase ATK] buff and a 30% [lncrease C.DMG] buff on this Champion for 2 turns if this attack kills an enemy. These buffs cannot be removed.

skills.name: Fumigator (Passive)

skills.name: Scourge of Mikage (Passive)
skills.description: Fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 15% whenever an enemy Champion takes a turn. If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, only on will activate. ★★★ Shadowkin Unity ★★★ 1 Faction Ally: Turn Meter increase effects used on allies are 20% more effective. Turn Meter increase effects used on enemies are 20% less effective. If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, only one will activate. 2 Faction Ally: Whenever this Champion has their Turn Meter filled, increases the damage of their next attack by 5%. Resets after a skill is used. If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, only one will activate. 3 Faction Ally: All allies are immune to Turn Meter reduction effects from enemies.

skills.name: Cunning Chaos
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a [HP Burn] debuff for 3 turns. Has a 75% chance of placing a [Stun] debuff for 1 turn on targets with 50% Turn Meter or more. Has a 75% chance of placing a 30% [Decrease SPD] debuff for 3 turns on target with less than 50% Turn Meter.

skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Damage increases by 40% for each active [HP Burn] debuff in the battle (up to 400%). Also has a 75% chance of decreasing the target’s Turn Meter by 15%. Decreases the target’s Turn Meter by an additional 15% for each active [HP Burn] debuff in the battle.

skills.name: Inner Heat (Passive)
skills.description: Whenever an ally receives a [Freeze] debuff, has a 50% chance of replacing it with a [HP Burn] for 2 turns instead. This debuff cannot be blocked or removed. Whenever any ally or enemy is under a [HP Burn], this champion is immune to [Stun], [Sleep], [Freeze], [Fear], [True Fear], [Provoke], and [Petrification] debuffs.

skills.name: Reaping Cull
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit has an extra 20% chance of inflicting a critical hit. Each hit restores this Champion’s destroyed MAX HP, equal to the damage inflicted. Each hit also heals this Champion by 30% of the damage inflicted. Grants an Extra Turn if this attack kills an enemy.

skills.name: Horde of Calamity

The third hit places a 25% [Weaken] debuff for 2 turns. The fourth hit places a 30% [Decrease SPD] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Necroclysm

If this attack kills an enemy, places an [Unkillable] buff on this Champion for 1 turn. If this attack kills 2 or more enemies, places an [Unkillable] buff on this Champion for 2 turns instead.

skills.name: Immortal Creation (Passive)
skills.description: At the start of this Champion’s turn, places a [Shield] buff equal to 50% of this Champion’s MAX HP on them for 1 turn. Also places a 50% [Increase ATK] buff on this Champion for 1 turn.

skills.name: Fell Scythe

If the target is under a [Hex] debuff before the attack, transfers all debuffs from this Champion to the target before attacking instead.

skills.name: Final Testament

Will ignore 35% of each target’s DEF instead if they are under a [Hex] debuff. Damage increases by 10% for each debuff on each target.

skills.name: Termination

skills.name: Banquet of Death (Passive)

If any ally Arbiter is about to get killed by a fatal hit, places an [Unkillable] buff on her for 1 turn. If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, this effect will only activate once.

skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Before attacking, places a 50% [Increase ACC] buff on all allies for 2 turns. Places a [True Fear] debuff on all enemies for 1 turn.

Also increases each ally’s MAX HP by 5% every time they use an active skill (stacks up to 50%). Resets each Round. Will not increase the MAX HP of Bosses.

skills.name: Wintry Wind (Passive, Cooldown: 8 turns)
skills.description: [Passive Effect] Has a 20% chance of placing a [Freeze] debuff on the enemy each time they receive a buff or have their Turn Meter filled. The 20% chance applies up to twice per enemy turn (once for buffs, once for Turn Meter fills) in cases where an enemy receives multiple of these effects at the same time. Does not work with effects from Artifact Sets, Turn Meter filling effects from Masteries, healing, or those buffs or effects that take place at the start of a Round. [Active Effect] Revives this Champion to 100% HP when killed and places a [Freeze] debuff on this Champion for 1 turn.

skills.name: Withering Onslaught

skills.name: Enrobed in Gore (Passive)

skills.name: Metamorph
skills.description: Transforms this Champion into their Base/Alternate Form. Then grants an Extra Turn.

skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 50% chance of placing a 30% [Decrease SPD] debuff for 2 turns. Also has a 30% chance of placing a [Fear] debuff for 1 turn on enemies with 50% or less Turn Meter.

skills.name: Stagnation Sickness
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has an 80% chance of placing a [Stun] debuff for 1 turn. After attacking, has an 80% chance of decreasing each enemy’s Turn Meter by 30%.

skills.name: Uncanny (Passive)
