skills.name: Storm of Righteousness
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Before attacking, removes all [Increase DEF], [Ally Protection], and [Strengthen] buffs from all enemies. This effect cannot be resisted. If at least one buff was removed, also places a 50% [Increase ATK] buff and a 30% [Increase C. DMG] buff on this Champion for 2 turns. Will also ignore 30% of each target’s DEF. Boosts this Champion’s Turn Meter by 30% for each enemy alive after the attack.

skills.name: By My Hand!
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit ignores 30% of the target’s DEF and destroys the enemy’s MAX HP by 25% of the damage dealt. Cannot destroy a single enemy’s MAX HP by more than 75%. If the target is a Boss, destroys MAX HP equal to 35% of the damage dealt. If the target has any active skills on cooldown, both hits will ignore 50% of the target’s DEF instead. Ignores [Shield], [Unkillable], and [Block Damage] buffs.

skills.name: Inexorable (Passive, Cooldown: 4 turns)
skills.description: Instantly resets the cooldown on one of this Champion’s random active skills, whenever an enemy increases the cooldown of any of their skills. Grants an Extra Turn if a skill’s cooldown was reset. After granting an Extra Turn, places this skill on cooldown. Will also grant an Extra Turn if an ally, Mastery, Artifact Set, or Accessory decreases the cooldown of any of this Champion’s skills. After granting an Extra Turn, places this skill on cooldown.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally C.RATE in All Battles by 24%

skills.name: Accursed Blades
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 3 times. Each hit has a 35% chance of increasing the duration of all debuffs by 1 turn.

skills.name: Master of Misery
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit has a 50% chance of placing a [Block Buffs] debuff, a 50% [Decrease ATK] debuff, and a 100% [Heal Reduction] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Vizier of Poisons
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Applies a [Debuff Spread] effect, taking 2 random debuffs from the target and placing them on all enemies. Places a [Perfect Veil] buff on this Champion for 3 turns if the target is under 2 or more debuffs.

skills.name: Unseen Assassin (Passive)
skills.description: Places a [Perfect Veil] buff on this champion for 2 turns at the start of each round.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally Attack in Dungeons by 34%

skills.name: Render Flesh
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 35% chance of instantly activating any [Poison] and [HP Burn] debuffs on each enemy.

skills.name: Venge-fire
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing two 5% [Poison] debuffs and a [HP Burn] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Despoiler of Anhelt
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Before attacking, places a 50% [Increase ACC] buff on all allies for 2 turns. Then increases the duration of all enemy debuffs by 1 turn. Also decreases the duration of all ally debuffs by 1 turn.

skills.name: Bonegrinder Brand (Passive)
skills.description: Increases each ally’s ACC by 10 for each [HP Burn] and [Poison] debuff on the enemy team. If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, only one will activate. ★★★ Ogryn Tribes Unity ★★★ 1 Faction ally: [HP Burn] and [Poison] debuffs placed by allies deal 30% more damage. 2 Faction allies: Increases damage dealt by enemies by 5% for each [HP Burn] and [Poison] debuff on a target. 3 Faction allies: [HP Burn] and [Poison] debuffs placed by allies cannot be removed, stolen, or transferred.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally HP in all battles by 30%. Increases Increases Ally SPD in all battles by 15% for Ogryn Tribes.

skills.name: Thirsting Blade
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Decreases the target’s MAX HP by 30% of the damage inflicted. Also heals this Champion by 30% of the damage inflicted.

skills.name: Exsanguinate
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a [Leech] debuff for 2 turns. Also has a 75% chance of stealing 50% of the Turn Meter from Champions from the Bannerlord, Sacred Order, or High Elf Factions. Has a 75% chance of decreasing the Turn Meter by 50% instead against targets not from those Factions.

skills.name: Mind Shroud
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff for 2 turns and a [Block Active Skills] debuff for 2 turns. Places a [Perfect Veil] buff on this Champion for 2 turns.

skills.name: Notorious (Passive)
skills.description: Places a [Revive On Death] buff on this Champion for 2 turns every time this Champion kills an enemy. Also fully heals this Champion and fills their Turn Meter by 50% every time they kill an enemy. [Will only heal and fill this Champion’s Turn Meter when Konstantin the Dayborn is on the same team]

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally C.RATE in All Battles by 30%

skills.name: Molten Blade
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Each time this skill is used, permanently increases the damage inflicted by this skill by 10% [stacks up to 100%]. Counterattacks with this skill each time an enemy under a [HP Burn] debuff attacks this Champion or their allies.

skills.name: Flaming Terror
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Places a [Fear] debuff for 2 turns. This debuff cannot be resisted by enemies under a [HP Burn] debuff.

skills.name: Demolition Burn
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. The damage inflicted by this skill increases by 10% for the turns left remaining of any [HP Burn] debuffs on the target [stacks up to 100%].

skills.name: Surging Demonfyre (Passive)
skills.description: Whenever an enemy receives a buff or has their Turn Meter increased, has a 50% chance to place a [HP Burn] debuff, has a 50% chance to instantly activate it instead.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally DEF in all battles by 33% Increases Ally SPD in all battles by 19% for Demonspawn.

skills.name: Corpsefire
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Instantly activates any [HP Burn] debuffs on the target after attacking.

skills.name: Exalted Pyre
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing an [HP Burn] debuff on all enemies for 2 turns. This debuff cannot be resisted.

skills.name: Deaths Balance
skills.description: Equalizes the HP of all allies, then attacks 1 enemy. The HP levels of all allies will be brought up to the level of the ally with the highest HP. The attack will ignore 30% of the target’s DEF if the target’s current HP is equal to or lower than this champion’s current HP. Will decrease the cooldown of the Exalted Pyre skill by 1 turn if the target’s current HP is higher than this Champion’s current HP.

skills.name: Fortress (Passive)
skills.description: Reflects 30% of the damage this Champion receives back to the attacker if this Champion has 50% HP or more. Deals 30% more damage instead if this Champion has less than 50% HP.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally HP in all Battles by 30%.

skills.name: Skyfall Arrow
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. This attack will not trigger counterattacks. Fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 5% for each living enemy after the attack.

skills.name: Falcon Shot
skills.description: Attacks all enemies 2 times. The first hit has a 75% chance of placing a [Block Buffs] debuff for 2 turns. The second hit has a 75% chance of placing a 50% [Decrease ATK] debuff for 2 turns. Fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 5% for each living enemy after the attack.

skills.name: Forever Marked
skills.description: Places a 50% [Increase ATK] buff, a 50% [Increase ACC] buff and a 30% [Increase SPD] buff on this Champion for 3 turns. Then grants an Extra Turn.

skills.name: No Foe Too Great (Passive)
skills.description: Increases this Champion’s MAX HP by 20% for each enemy killed or Hydra Head decapitated by this Champion (stacks up to 50,000).

skills.name: Cry Havoc
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit places a 50% [Decrease ATK] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Special Brew
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Places two [Bomb] debuffs that detonate after 2 turns. Bomb damage increases by 100% against Bosses.

skills.name: Mother’s Touch
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Instantly detonates all [Bomb] debuffs if this Champion is under an [Increase ATK] buff.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ACC in Faction Crypts by 65.

skills.name: Brutal Force
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 3 times. Has a 25% chance of placing a [Provoke] debuff for 1 turn. Each hit also heals this Champion and the ally with the lowest HP by 3% of this Champion’s MAX HP.

skills.name: Marauder
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Steals all buffs from the target, and places a [Provoke] debuff on them for 3 turns. Also has a 50% chance of placing a [Provoke] debuff on all other enemies for 1 turn. Then places a [Shield] buff on all allies for 2 turns. The value of the [Shield] is proportional to this Champion’s DEF.

skills.name: Standstill (Passive)
skills.description: Whenever an ally under a [Shield] buff is hit by an enemy, heals that ally by 25% of the damage dealt to the [Shield]. Increases this Champion’s DEF by 10% for each enemy under a [Provoke] debuff. Will also increase this Champion’s DEF by 5% for each enemy not under a [Provoke] debuff.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ACC in all Battles by 60.

skills.name: Bludgeon
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 25% chance of increasing the duration of all debuffs on the target by 1 turn.

skills.name: Protection of Gods
skills.description: Places a [Block Debuffs] buff on all allies for 1 turn, then places a [Shield] buff on all allies for equal to 30% of this Champion’s MAX HP for 2 turns. Heals all allies by 25% of their MAX HP.

skills.name: Orcish Rituals
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 70% chance to put each target’s Skills on cooldown. Has a 30% chance to fully deplete each target’s Turn Meter.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally RESIST in all Battles by 80.

skills.name: Corruption Scepter
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 30% chance of randomly increasing the cooldown of one of the target’s skills by 2 turns. This effect cannot be resisted if Wight Queen Ankora is on the same team.

skills.name: Desecration Blast
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Will ignore 25% of the target’s DEF. Places an extra hit on targets under [Shield] or [Strengthen] buffs. Damage inflicted by this skill cannot be decreased by enemy Passive skills or Masteries, except by the Passive skills of Bosses. Damage inflicted by this skill cannot be increased by either this Champion’s Masteries or ally Passive skills, except when attacking Bosses.

skills.name: Spirits, Claim You
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Increases the damage inflicted with this skill by 10% for each buff on the target (stacks up to 50%) and by an additional 10% for each buff on this Champion (stacks up to 50%). If this attack kills a target under 3 or more buffs, places a [Block Revive] debuff. Also grants an Extra Turn if this attack kills an enemy when Wight Queen Ankora is on the same team.

skills.name: Mantle of Undeath (Passive)
skills.description: This Champion will receive 50% less damage when attacked by enemies, including Bosses and their minions, out of their active turn. If Wight Queen Ankora is on the same team, this champion will receive no damage when attacked by enemies out of their active turn. [This effect does not apply against bosses and their minions]. This champion will also ignore [Shield] and [Strengthen] buffs.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally HP in all_battles by 33%

skills.name: Necrobolt
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 30% chance of decreasing the cooldown of a random ally’s skill by 2 turns (except this Champion). If Wight King Narses is on the same team and has any active skills on cooldown, decreases the cooldown of one of their skills by 2 turns. If Wight king Narses is on the same team and has no active skill on cooldown, decreases the cooldown of a random ally’s skill by 2 turns except this Champion. If the cooldown on a skill is fully reset, also heals that ally by 10% of this Champion’s MAX HP.

skills.name: Shield of Emaria
skills.description: Removes all debuffs from all allies, and places a [Shield] buff on them equal to 25% of this Champion’s MAX HP for 2 turns. If Wight King Narses is on the same team, also places a 25% [Strengthen] buff on all allies for 2 turns. Then, fills the turn meters of all allies by 10%

skills.name: Rise, My Love
skills.description: Revives a dead ally with 50% HP and 75% Turn Meter. Resets the cooldowns of the revived ally’s skills. If the target is Wight King Narses, revives them with 75% HP and 100% Turn Meter instead. After the revival, decreases the Turn Meters of all enemies by 10%. If Wight King Narses is revived, decreases the turn meters of all enemies by 20% instead. This effect cannot be resisted.

skills.name: Queen Consort (Passive, Cooldown: 3 turns)
skills.description: Whenever an enemy ties to place a [Fear], [True Fear], [Freeze], [Provoke], [Sleep], [Stun], or [Petrification] debuff on the ally with the highest C.DMG, transfer those debuffs to this Champions instead. Fills the Turn Meter of this Champion by 50% if this Champion misses their turn due to one of these debuffs. At the start of this Champion’s turn, remove any [Fear], [True Fear], [Freeze], [Provoke], [Sleep], [Stun], or [Petrification] debuffs from this Champion, if Wight King Narses is on the same team. If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, only on will activate.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally SPD in all_battles by 19%

skills.name: Winds of Winter
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 30% chance of placing a [Freeze] debuff for 1 turn. This debuff cannot be resisted. Places a [Perfect Veil] buff on the ally with the lowest HP for 2 turns.

skills.name: Frostbite Blast
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 70% chance of placing a 50% [Decrease ATK] debuff and a 50% [Decrease ACC] debuff for 2 turns. These debuffs cannot be resisted. Also places a 30% [Increase C.DMG] buff on all allies for 2 turns.

skills.name: Icegrave Armor
skills.description: Places a 25% [Strengthen] buff and a 60% [Increase DEF] buff on all allies for 2 turns. Has a 60% chance of placing a [Freeze] debuff on all enemies for 1 turn. This debuff cannot be resisted.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally DEF in All Battles by 33%

skills.name: Soul’s Impalement
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 50% chance of placing a [Leech] debuff for 1 turn. Also places a 15% [Continuous Heal] buff on a random ally or 2 turns.

skills.name: Feel No Pain
skills.description: Places a 60% [Increase DEF] buff on all allies for 2 turns. Also increases the duration of all [Continuous Heal] buffs on all allies by 1 turn, then instantly activates any [Continuous Heal] buffs on all allies.

skills.name: Azure Redeemer
skills.description: Removes all debuffs from all allies, then heals all allies by 30% of this champion’s MAX HP

skills.name: Eternal Flame (Passive)
skills.description: Places a 15% [Continuous Heal] buff on the ally with the lowest HP for 1 turn at the start of each turn.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally Resist in all Battles by 50.

skills.name: Sword of Redemption
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Will ignore 3% of the target’s DEF for each buff on the target. Will also ignore [Shield] buffs if the target is under 2 or more buffs or debuffs.

skills.name: Chakram Cyclone
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Will ignore 5% of the target’s DEF for each buff on the target. Steals 20% of the Turn Meter from each enemy. This effect cannot be resisted if the target is under 2 or more buffs or debuffs.

skills.name: Whip of Destiny
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Will ignore 10% of the target’s DEF for each buff on the target. Resets the cooldown of this skill if it kills 2 or more enemies.

skills.name: For the Greater Good! (Passive, Cooldown: 3 turns)
skills.description: [Passive Effect] Increases this Champion’s ATK by 10% every time they use an active skill (stacks up to 100%). Resets each Round. Also has a 50% chance of randomly changing this Champion’s weak hits to normal, strong, or critical hits. The chance increases to 100% when attacking enemies under 2 or more buffs or debuffs. [Active Effect] Fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 100% and places a 50% [Increase ATK] buff on this Champion for 1 turn whenever 8 or more buffs are placed on the enemy team in a single turn.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ATK in Arena Battles by 33%.

skills.name: Tail Stab
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Places a 5% [Poison] debuff for 2 turns. Places three 5% [Poison] debuffs if this attack is critical. Also places a [Perfect Veil] buff on this Champion for 2 turns.

skills.name: Infestation
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Before attacking, places a [Stun] debuff and an [Infest] debuff on the target for 2 turns. These debuffs cannot be resisted if this Champion is under a [Perfect Veil] buff. Places a [True Fear] debuff on all other enemies for 1 turn. This debuff cannot be resisted if this Champion is under a [Perfect Veil] buff. [Passive Effect] Revives this Champion with 50% HP and 50% Turn Meter whenever an enemy under an [Infest] debuff dies.

skills.name: Rip and Claw
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Deals 15% more damage for each [Poison] debuff on the target. Also places a [Perfect Veil] buff on this Champion for 2 turns.

skills.name: Caustic Blood (Passive)
skills.description: Whenever this Champion is attacked, has a 25% chance to place a 5% [Poison] debuff on the attacker for 2 turns. This debuff cannot be resisted or blocked if the attack is critical. If an enemy is under a [Poison] debuff placed by this Champion, decreases their DEF by 20%.

skills.name: Bejeweled Club
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 40% chance of decreasing the cooldown of a random ally’s skill by 1 turn. Cannot decrease this Champion’s cooldowns. Also heals the ally who had their skill cooldown decreased by 10% of this Champion’s MAX HP.

skills.name: Primeval Secret
skills.description: Places an [Unkillable] buff and a [Counterattack] buff on a single ally for 2 turns. Also decreases the cooldown of all that ally’s skills by 2 turns. This skill’s cooldown cannot be decreased or reset.

skills.name: Coccoon Of Revival
skills.description: Revives a single ally with 50% HP and 75% Turn Meter. Places a 50% [Increase ATK] buff and a 60% [Increase DEF] buff on that ally for 2 turns.

skills.name: Temporal Scholar (Passive)
skills.description: Whenever an enemy Champion’s passive skill activates, fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 30%. Occurs once per turn.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally SPD in All Battles by 20%

skills.name: Axe of Allwinter
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit has a 40% chance of placing a [Freeze] debuff for 1 turn. Will also ignore 25% of the target’s DEF against enemies under [Freeze] debuffs.

skills.name: Blizzard Rider
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 75% chance of placing a 30% [Decrease SPD] debuff for 3 turns and a 75% chance of placing a [Freeze] debuff for 1 turn. Also steals 100% of the target’s Turn Meter and places a 30% [Increase SPD] buff on this champion for 3 turns. Will ignore 50% of the target’s DEF against targets under [Freeze] debuffs.

skills.name: Glaciate
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a [Freeze] debuff for 1 turn. This chance increases to 100% against targets with 75% or more Turn Meter. This debuff cannot be resisted by targets with 75% or more Turn Meter.

skills.name: Lord of Ice
skills.description: [Passive Effect] Increases the damage this Champion inflicts by 10% for each Champion in battle under a [Freeze] debuff (ally or enemy). Also decreases the damage this Champion receives by 10% for each Champion under a [Freeze] debuff (ally or enemy) [Active Effect] Places a [Unkillable] buff on this champion for 1 turn whenever they kill an enemy under a [Freeze] debuff

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ATK in All Battles by 33%

skills.name: Even the Odds
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit has a 50% chance of placing a [Leech] debuff for 2 turns. Attacks all enemies 2 times instead if this Champion is under a [Veil] buff.

skills.name: Baffling Speed
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Places a [Perfect Veil] buff on this Champion for 3 turns if this attack is critical. Grants an Extra Turn.

skills.name: Elven Judgement
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Will ignore [Shield] buffs. Removes [Shield] buffs from targets if this Champion is under a [Veil] buff or [Perfect Veil] buff, then deals extra damage equal to 15% of the value of the removed [Shield] buffs.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally Attack in all battles by 30%

skills.name: Battle Catalyst
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 50% chance of placing a 50% [Decrease ATK] debuff for 2 turns. The ally with the highest C.DMG also joins to attack the enemy with the lowest HP. The ally joining the attack will use their default skill.

skills.name: Fumes of the Grail
skills.description: Places a [Poison Cloud] buff, a 30% [Increase SPD] buff and two 15% [Continuous Heal] buffs on a target ally for 2 turns. Also fills the target’s Turn Meter by 50%.

skills.name: Malignant Growth
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff and a 25% [Weaken] debuff for 2 turns. Will ignore [Block Debuffs] buffs.

skills.name: Yncensed (Passive)
skills.description: Increases this Champion’s ACC by 10 for each buff on each enemy. Whenever an enemy receives a buff, their Turn Meter is decreased by 10%.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ACC in all battles by 70

skills.name: Strong Booze
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 40% chance of placing a [Stun] debuff for 1 turn. Places a 50% [Decrease RES] debuff for 2 turns instead if the [Stun] debuff is not placed.

skills.name: Flaming Spirits
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of placing a 50% [Decrease ACC] debuff and a [HP Burn] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Battle Toast
skills.description: Places a 50% [Increase ATK] buff and a 50% [Increase ACC] buff on all allies for 2 turns, and fills the Turn Meters of all allies by 20%. Also has a 75% chance of placing a [True Fear] debuff on all enemies for 1 turn.

skills.name: Partier (Passive)
skills.description: Fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 5% each time an enemy receives a buff.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally SPD in all Battles by 19%

skills.name: Winnowing Winter
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Has a 25% chance of placing a [Block Active Skills] debuff for 1 turn. This debuff cannot be resisted if there is at least 1 enemy under a [Stun], [Freeze], [Sleep], [Fear], [True Fear], [Provoke], or [Petrification] debuff. Instantly activates this skill whenever this Champion skips a turn because of a [Stun], [Freeze], [Sleep], [Fear], [True Fear], [Provoke], or [Petrification] debuff.

skills.name: Blizzard of Strikes
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Will ignore [Block Damage] buffs. Has a 75% chance of placing a [Freeze] debuff on all enemies for 1 turn. This debuff cannot be resisted, if there is at least 1 enemy under a [Stun], [Freeze], [Sleep], [Fear], [True Fear], [Provoke], or [Petrification] debuff. Revives one random ally with 50% HP and 50% Turn Meter, if this skill did not kill an enemy. Revives all allies with 50% HP and 50% Turn Meter, if this skill kills at least one enemy.

skills.name: Stain The Snows
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Before attacking, steals all Turn Meter from the target. This effect cannot be resisted if there is at least 1 enemy under a [Stun], [Freeze], [Sleep], [Fear], [True Fear], [Provoke], or [Petrification] debuff. Also equalizes the target’s DEF with this Champion’s DEF for this attack. The damage inflicted by this skill increases by the amount of Turn Meter stolen.

skills.name: Solitary Demon
skills.description: Fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 50% whenever this Champion skips a turn because of a [Stun], [Freeze], [Sleep], [Fear], [True Fear], [Provoke], or [Petrification] debuff. Whenever this Champion skips a turn because of one of those debuffs, their next active skill will ignore 50% of the target’s DEF.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ATK in Arena by 33%

skills.name: Wereclaws
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Each hit steals 7.5% of the target’s Turn Meter if this champion has 50% HP or more. Each hit heals this Champion by 30% of the damage inflicted if this Champion has less than 50% HP.

skills.name: Destiny’s Mirror
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has an 80% chance of placing a [Hex] debuff for 3 turns. Whenever an enemy tries to place debuffs on either this Champion or an ally, has a 55% chance of transferring those debuffs to a random enemy under a [Hex] debuff placed by this Champion. This happens before any debuffs are placed on the initial target. Has a 30% chance against Bosses. Whenever someone fills the Turn Meter of an enemy under a [Hex] debuff placed by this Champion, this Champion’s Turn Meter will be filled instead. Only available when Karato Foxhunter is on the same team.

skills.name: Dance of Time
skills.description: Decreases the cooldowns of all ally skills by 3 turns and increases the cooldowns of all enemy skills by 3 turns. Will not decrease the cooldowns of this Champion’s other skills.

skills.name: Deep Cover (Passive)
skills.description: Places a [Perfect Veil] buff on this Champion for 2 turns at the start of each Round. This champion is immune to all debuffs if they are under a [Veil] or [Perfect Veil] buff. Whenever a [Veil] or [Perfect Veil] buff is placed on an enemy, has a 75% chance of stealing the buff. This happens before the buff is placed on the initial target. Only available when Karato Foxhunter is on the same team.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increase Ally ACC in all Battles by 60

skills.name: Transfix
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 3 times. Each hit has a 40% chance of placing a 5% [Poison] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Poison Rain
skills.description: Attacks all enemies 2 times. Each hit has a 50% chance of placing a 5% [Poison] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Deadly Catalyst
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Enemies killed by this skill cannot be revived. Deals damage from all [Poison] debuffs on the target instantly. [Poison] debuffs will only deal half of the standard damage when this Skill hits Bosses.

skills.name: Calamitous Partner
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Applies a [Debuff Spread] effect, taking 4 random debuffs from the target and placing them on all enemies. [Only available when Belanor is on the same team].

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally ATK in all Battles by 33%.

skills.name: Blade Combo
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 3 times. Has a 30% chance of placing a 25% [Weaken] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Blade Strike
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 4 times. Each hit increases this Champion’s Turn Meter by 5%. Also places a 30% [Increase SPD] buff on all allies for 2 turns.

skills.name: Blade Spin
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 4 times. Before attacking, places a 50% [Increase ATK] buff on this Champion for 2 turns. The first and the second hit each have a 75% chance of placing a [Leech] debuff for 2 turns. The third and the fourth hit each have a 75% chance of placing a 50% [Decrease ATK] debuff for 2 turns.

skills.name: Zinogre Essence (Passive, Cooldown: 4 turns)
skills.description: [Passive Effect] Increases the damage this Champion deals by 1% for every 1% of HP lost (stacks up to 50%). This increased damage doubles if a target is under a [Decrease DEF] debuff. [Active Effect] Prevents this Champion’s death and keeps them alive on 1 HP when hit by a fatal hit. If this skill prevents this Champion’s death, heals them by 50% of their MAX HP. Will not prevent this Champion’s death if they are under a [Heal Reduction] debuff.

skills.name: Aura
skills.description: Increases Ally SPD in Dungeons by 30%
